Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat. Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispAdjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispUnivalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.Sub1Cell.

Local Open Scope cat.


C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
rinvunitor f • (α ▹ id₁ b) = α • rinvunitor g


C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
rinvunitor f • (α ▹ id₁ b) = α • rinvunitor g

  
C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
is_invertible_2cell (rinvunitor f)
C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
α ▹ id₁ b = ?Hε ^-1 • (α • rinvunitor g)

  
C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
is_invertible_2cell (rinvunitor f)

    is_iso.
  
C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
α ▹ id₁ b =
(is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor f) ^-1
• (α • rinvunitor g)

  
C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
α ▹ id₁ b = runitor f • (α • rinvunitor g)

  
C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
α ▹ id₁ b = (runitor f • α) • rinvunitor g

  
C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
is_invertible_2cell (rinvunitor g)
C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
(α ▹ id₁ b) • ?Hε ^-1 = runitor f • α

  
C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
is_invertible_2cell (rinvunitor g)

    is_iso.
  
C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
(α ▹ id₁ b) • (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor g) ^-1 =
runitor f • α

  
C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
α: f ==> g
(α ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g = runitor f • α

  apply vcomp_runitor.
Qed.

Section DisplayedInserter.
  Context {B C : bicat}
          (F G : psfunctor B C).

  (*
    https://ncatlab.org/nlab/show/dialgebra
   *)
  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_cat_ob_mor B

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_cat_ob_mor B

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
B → UU
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ x y : B, ?obd x → ?obd y → B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
B → UU
 exact (λ b, C⟦ F b , G b ⟧).
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ x y : B,
(λ b : B, C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) x
→ (λ b : B, C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) y → B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ x y : B,
C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧ → C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧ → B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
UU

      exact (#F f · fy ==> fx · #G f).
  Defined.

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_cat_id_comp B disp_inserter_disp_cat

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_cat_id_comp B disp_inserter_disp_cat

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (x : B) (xx : disp_inserter_disp_cat x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
(λ _ : ∏ (x : B) (xx : disp_inserter_disp_cat x),
       xx -->[ id₁ x] xx,
 ∏ (x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (xx : disp_inserter_disp_cat x)
 (yy : disp_inserter_disp_cat y)
 (zz : disp_inserter_disp_cat z),
 xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz)
  ?pr1

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (x : B) (xx : disp_inserter_disp_cat x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (x : B) (xx : C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧),
# F (id₁ x) · xx ==> xx · # G (id₁ x)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
# F (id₁ x) · fx ==> fx · # G (id₁ x)

      exact (((psfunctor_id F x)^-1 ▹ fx)
               • lunitor _
               • rinvunitor _
               • (_ ◃ psfunctor_id G x)).
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
(λ _ : ∏ (x : B) (xx : disp_inserter_disp_cat x),
       xx -->[ id₁ x] xx,
 ∏ (x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (xx : disp_inserter_disp_cat x)
 (yy : disp_inserter_disp_cat y)
 (zz : disp_inserter_disp_cat z),
 xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz)
  ((λ (x : B) (fx : C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧),
    ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
     • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
   :
   ∏ (x : B) (xx : disp_inserter_disp_cat x),
   xx -->[ id₁ x] xx)
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧) (yy : C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧)
(zz : C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧),
# F f · yy ==> xx · # G f
→ # F g · zz ==> yy · # G g
  → # F (f · g) · zz ==> xx · # G (f · g)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
# F (f · g) · fz ==> fx · # G (f · g)

      exact (((psfunctor_comp _ _ _)^-1 ▹ _)
               • rassociator _ _ _
               • (_ ◃ βg)
               • lassociator _ _ _
               • (αf ▹ _)
               • rassociator _ _ _
               • (_ ◃ psfunctor_comp _ _ _)).
  Defined.

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_2cell_struct disp_inserter_disp_cat

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_2cell_struct disp_inserter_disp_cat

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
fx: disp_inserter_disp_cat x
fy: disp_inserter_disp_cat y
αf: fx -->[ f] fy
βg: fx -->[ g] fy
UU

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
UU

    exact (##F α ▹ fy • βg
           =
           αf • (_ ◃ ##G α)).
  Defined.

  (*
  F C = C^op
  G C = Set
  #G f = id
  ##G f = id2
   *)

F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_prebicat_ops disp_inserter_prebicat_1

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ id₂ f] f'
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
id_disp x ;; f' ==>[ lunitor f] f'
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ;; id_disp y ==>[ runitor f] f'
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp x ;; f'
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] f' ;; id_disp y
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 c)
(z : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
(ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 c)
(z : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp ==>[
lassociator f g h] (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f g h : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h) (x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2) (x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b)
(z : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg1 : y -->[ g1] z) (gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c : B) (f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : f1 ==> f2) (x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b)
(z : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 c) (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y)
(ff2 : x -->[ f2] y) (gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ id₂ f] f'
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(y : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (f' : # F f · y ==> x · # G f),
(## F (id₂ f) ▹ y) • f' = f' • (x ◃ ## G (id₂ f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (id₂ f) ▹ fy) • αf = αf • (fx ◃ ## G (id₂ f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(id₂ (# F f) ▹ fy) • αf = αf • (fx ◃ id₂ (# G f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
id₂ (# F f · fy) • αf = αf • id₂ (fx · # G f)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
αf = αf

      reflexivity.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
id_disp x ;; f' ==>[ lunitor f] f'
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(y : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (f' : # F f · y ==> x · # G f),
(## F (lunitor f) ▹ y) • f' =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) f) ^-1 ▹ y)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F f) y)
     • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ f'))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) x (# G f))
   • ((((((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ x) • lunitor x)
        • rinvunitor x) • (x ◃ psfunctor_id G a))
      ▹ # G f)) • rassociator x (# G (id₁ a)) (# G f))
 • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ a) f))
• (x ◃ ## G (lunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f))
   • ((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
        • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
      ▹ # G f)) • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f))
• (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf =
((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
      • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
         • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
              • (lunitor fx
                 • (rinvunitor fx
                    • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
             ▹ # G f)
            • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
               • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
                  • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
is_invertible_2cell
  ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
?Hε ^-1 • ((## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf) =
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx
              • (rinvunitor fx
                 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))) ▹ # G f)
         • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
is_invertible_2cell
  ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)

        is_iso.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fy
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv
      (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f))) ^-1
• ((## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf) =
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx
              • (rinvunitor fx
                 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))) ▹ # G f)
         • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy)
• ((## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf) =
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx
              • (rinvunitor fx
                 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))) ▹ # G f)
         • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)))))))

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy)
• ((## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf) =
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f)
          • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
             • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
                • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f))))
         • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)))))))

• ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f)
          • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
             • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
                • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f))))
         • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)

               • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f))))))) =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy)

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f)
          • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
             • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
                • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f))))
         • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f))))))) = ?b

(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy)
• ((## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf)

      • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G f))
     • (lunitor fx ▹ # G f)) • (rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f))
   • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f))

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧

• (rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F f) fy
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ αf)
      • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G f)
         • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
            • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
               • (((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f)
                  • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x))
                       (# G f)
                     • ((fx
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
                        • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)))))))))) =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy)
• ((## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf)

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧

is_invertible_2cell
  (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F f) ▹ fy)
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
?Hε ^-1
• ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy)
   • ((## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf)) =
rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F f) fy
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G f)
      • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
         • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
            • (((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f)
               • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
                  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
                     • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
is_invertible_2cell
  (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F f) ▹ fy)

        is_iso.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fy
   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (# F f)
      (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_id F x))))
^-1
• ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy)
   • ((## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf)) =
rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F f) fy
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G f)
      • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
         • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
            • (((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f)
               • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
                  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
                     • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F f) ▹ fy)
• ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy)
   • ((## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf)) =
rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F f) fy
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G f)
      • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
         • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
            • (((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f)
               • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
                  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
                     • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F f) ▹ fy)
• ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy)
   • ((## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf)) = ?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
?b =
rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F f) fy
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G f)
      • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
         • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
            • (((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f)
               • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
                  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
                     • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)))))))))

fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F f) ▹ fy)
• ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy)
   • ((## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) • αf)) = ?b

fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F f) ▹ fy)
  • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy))
 • (## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy)) • αf = ?b

        
B, C: bicat

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F f) ▹ fy)
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f ▹ fy))
• (## F (lunitor f) ▹ fy) = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F f)
  • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) • ## F (lunitor f))
▹ fy = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy) • αf =
rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F f) fy
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G f)
      • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
         • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
            • (((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f)
               • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
                  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
                     • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)))))))))

      
B, C: bicat

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F f) fy
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G f)
      • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
         • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
            • (((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f)
               • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
                  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
                     • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f))))))))) =
(lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy) • αf

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧

• (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
   • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)
      • (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)))) = ?t2

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

  • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f))
• (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)) = ?t2

  • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G f)))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f))
• (fx ◃ ## G (lunitor f)) = ?t2

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧

   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G f)
      • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)

               • (fx ◃ lunitor (# G f))))))) =

 • rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (# G f))

        apply lwhisker_id2.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f

• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ αf)
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G f)
      • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f) • id₂ (fx · # G f)))) =
(lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy) • αf

(rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F f) fy
 • lunitor (# F f · fy)) • αf =
(lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy) • αf

• lunitor (# F f · fy) = lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧

• (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F f) fy
   • (lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy)) = lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F f) fy
 • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F f) fy)
• (lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy) = lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
id₂ (id₁ (F x) · # F f · fy) • (lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy) =
lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy

      apply id2_left.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ;; id_disp y ==>[ runitor f] f'
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(y : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (f' : # F f · y ==> x · # G f),
(## F (runitor f) ▹ y) • f' =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ b)) ^-1 ▹ y)
      • rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ b)) y)
     • (# F f
        ◃ (((((psfunctor_id F b) ^-1 ▹ y) • lunitor y)
            • rinvunitor y) • (y ◃ psfunctor_id G b))))
    • lassociator (# F f) y (# G (id₁ b)))
   • (f' ▹ # G (id₁ b)))
  • rassociator x (# G f) (# G (id₁ b)))
 • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ b)))
• (x ◃ ## G (runitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ gx)
      • rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) gx)
     • (# F f
        ◃ (((((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ gx)
             • lunitor gx) • rinvunitor gx)
           • (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y))))
    • lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y)))
   • (αf ▹ # G (id₁ y)))
  • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y)))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)))
• (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf =
((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ gx)
• (rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) gx
   • ((# F f
       ◃ (((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ gx)
          • (lunitor gx
             • (rinvunitor gx
                • (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))))
      • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
         • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
            • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
               • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
                  • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
is_invertible_2cell
  ((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ gx)
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
?Hε ^-1 • ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf) =
rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) gx
• ((# F f
    ◃ (((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ gx)
       • (lunitor gx
          • (rinvunitor gx • (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))))
   • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
      • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
               • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
is_invertible_2cell
  ((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ gx)

        is_iso.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker gx
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv
      (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)))) ^-1
• ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf) =
rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) gx
• ((# F f
    ◃ (((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ gx)
       • (lunitor gx
          • (rinvunitor gx • (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))))
   • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
      • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
               • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ gx)
• ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf) =
rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) gx
• ((# F f
    ◃ (((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ gx)
       • (lunitor gx
          • (rinvunitor gx • (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))))
   • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
      • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
               • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ gx)
• ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf) =
rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) gx
• (((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ gx))
    • ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
       • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
          • (# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))))
   • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
      • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
               • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) gx
• (((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ gx))
    • ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
       • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
          • (# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))))
   • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
      • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
               • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f))))))) =
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ gx)
• ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) gx
• (((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ gx))
    • ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
       • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
          • (# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))))
   • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
      • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
               • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f))))))) = ?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
?b =
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ gx)
• ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) gx
• (((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ gx))
    • ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
       • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
          • (# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))))
   • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
      • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
               • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f))))))) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
((((((((rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) gx
        • (# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ gx)))
       • (# F f ◃ lunitor gx))
      • (# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx))
     • (# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))
    • lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y)))
   • (αf ▹ # G (id₁ y)))
  • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y)))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)))
• (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) gx
• (# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ gx)) = ?y'

        apply rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
((((((((((# F f ◃ (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1) ▹ gx)
        • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx)
       • (# F f ◃ lunitor gx))
      • (# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx))
     • (# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))
    • lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y)))
   • (αf ▹ # G (id₁ y)))
  • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y)))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)))
• (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)) =
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ gx)
• ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
((# F f ◃ (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1) ▹ gx)
• (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
   • ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
      • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
         • ((# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
            • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
                  • (rassociator fx (# G f)
                       (# G (id₁ y))
                     • ((fx
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
                        • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))))))))) =
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ gx)
• ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf)

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ gx)
• ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf) =
((# F f ◃ (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1) ▹ gx)
• (rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
   • ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
      • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
         • ((# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
            • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
                  • (rassociator fx (# G f)
                       (# G (id₁ y))
                     • ((fx
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
                        • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f))))))))))

  ((# F f ◃ (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1) ▹ gx)
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
?Hε ^-1
• ((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ gx)
   • ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf)) =
rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
   • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
      • ((# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
         • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
            • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
               • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
                  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
                     • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
is_invertible_2cell
  ((# F f ◃ (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1) ▹ gx)

        is_iso.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker gx
   (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F f)
      (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_id F y))))
^-1
• ((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ gx)
   • ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf)) =
rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
   • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
      • ((# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
         • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
            • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
               • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
                  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
                     • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
((# F f ◃ psfunctor_id F y) ▹ gx)
• ((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ gx)
   • ((## F (runitor f) ▹ gx) • αf)) =
rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
   • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
      • ((# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
         • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
            • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
               • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))

                     • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))))))))

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(runitor (# F f) ▹ gx) • αf =
rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
   • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
      • ((# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
         • (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
            • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
               • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
                  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
                     • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))))))))

(# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
• (lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y))
   • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
      • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
         • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
            • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))))) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(((((# F f ◃ (gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
    • lassociator (# F f) gx (# G (id₁ y)))
   • (αf ▹ # G (id₁ y)))
  • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y)))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)))
• (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
((((lassociator (# F f) gx (id₁ (G y))
    • (# F f · gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
   • (αf ▹ # G (id₁ y)))
  • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y)))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)))
• (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
lassociator (# F f) gx (id₁ (G y))
• ((# F f · gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)
   • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
      • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
         • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
            • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))))) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(# F f · gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)
• ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
   • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
         • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f))))) = ?t2

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
((((# F f · gx ◃ psfunctor_id G y)
   • (αf ▹ # G (id₁ y)))
  • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y)))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)))
• (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
((((αf ▹ id₁ (G y)) • (fx · # G f ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
  • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y)))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)))
• (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(αf ▹ id₁ (G y))
• ((fx · # G f ◃ psfunctor_id G y)
   • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
         • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f))))) = ?t2

(fx · # G f ◃ psfunctor_id G y)
• (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
   • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))
      • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)))) = ?t2

(((fx · # G f ◃ psfunctor_id G y)
  • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y)))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)))
• (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)) = ?t2

  • (fx ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)))
• (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f)) = ?t2

   • (fx ◃ ## G (runitor f))) = ?t2

F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧

fx
◃ ((# G f ◃ psfunctor_id G y)
   • (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y) • ## G (runitor f))) =
?t2

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
fx ◃ runitor (# G f) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
   • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
      • (lassociator (# F f) gx (id₁ (G y))
         • ((αf ▹ id₁ (G y))
            • (rassociator fx (# G f) (id₁ (G y))
               • (fx ◃ runitor (# G f))))))) =
(runitor (# F f) ▹ gx) • αf

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
   • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
      • (lassociator (# F f) gx (id₁ (G y))
         • ((αf ▹ id₁ (G y)) • runitor (fx · # G f))))) =
(runitor (# F f) ▹ gx) • αf

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
   • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
      • (lassociator (# F f) gx (id₁ (G y))
         • (runitor (# F f · gx) • αf)))) =
(runitor (# F f) ▹ gx) • αf

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
((((rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
    • (# F f ◃ lunitor gx)) • (# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx))
  • lassociator (# F f) gx (id₁ (G y)))
 • runitor (# F f · gx)) • αf =
(runitor (# F f) ▹ gx) • αf

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
(((rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
   • (# F f ◃ lunitor gx)) • (# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx))
 • lassociator (# F f) gx (id₁ (G y)))
• runitor (# F f · gx) = runitor (# F f) ▹ gx

gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f

• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
   • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx)
      • (lassociator (# F f) gx (id₁ (G y))
         • runitor (# F f · gx)))) =
runitor (# F f) ▹ gx

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧

• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
   • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor gx) • (# F f ◃ runitor gx))) =
runitor (# F f) ▹ gx

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx)
   • (# F f ◃ (rinvunitor gx • runitor gx))) =
runitor (# F f) ▹ gx

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧

• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx) • (# F f ◃ id₂ gx)) =

F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f

• ((# F f ◃ lunitor gx) • id₂ (# F f · gx)) =
runitor (# F f) ▹ gx

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
gx: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · gx ==> fx · # G f
rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) gx
• (# F f ◃ lunitor gx) = runitor (# F f) ▹ gx

      apply lunitor_lwhisker.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp x ;; f'
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(y : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (f' : # F f · y ==> x · # G f),
(## F (linvunitor f) ▹ y)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) f) ^-1 ▹ y)
        • rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F f) y)
       • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ f'))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) x (# G f))
     • ((((((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ x) • lunitor x)
          • rinvunitor x) • (x ◃ psfunctor_id G a))
        ▹ # G f))
    • rassociator x (# G (id₁ a)) (# G f))
   • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ a) f)) =
f' • (x ◃ ## G (linvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (linvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)
        • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy)
       • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f))
     • ((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
          • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
        ▹ # G f))
    • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)) =
αf • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (linvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)
        • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy)
       • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f))
     • ((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f)
          • (lunitor fx ▹ # G f))
         • (rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f))
        • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f)))
    • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)) =
αf • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (linvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
         • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
            • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f)
               • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
                  • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
                     • (((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
                         ▹ # G f)
                        • (rassociator fx
                             (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
                           • (fx
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (id₁ x) f)))))))))) =
αf • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (linvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
         • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
            • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f)
               • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
                  • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
                     • (((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
                         ▹ # G f)
                        • (rassociator fx
                             (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
                           • (fx
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (id₁ x) f)))))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
?b = αf • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (linvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
         • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
            • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f)
               • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
                  • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
                     • (((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
                         ▹ # G f)
                        • (rassociator fx
                             (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
                           • (fx
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (id₁ x) f)))))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
• (((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G f)
   • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f))) = ?t2

   • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f)
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f))) = ?b

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
?b = ?t2

   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)) = ?t20

 • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G f))

 • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G f)))

B, C: bicat

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f)) = ?t20

          apply idpath.
        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
• (rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (# G f)
   • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G f))
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f))) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(((rinvunitor fx ▹ # G f)
  • rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (# G f))
 • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G f)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((id₂ (# G f) ⋆⋆ rinvunitor fx
  • rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (# G f))
 • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G f)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(linvunitor (# G f) ⋆⋆ id₂ fx
 • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G f)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((fx ◃ linvunitor (# G f))
 • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G f)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
fx
◃ ((linvunitor (# G f) • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G f))
   • psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) f) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor f) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (linvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
         • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
            • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f)
               • ((lunitor fx ▹ # G f)
                  • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor f)))))))) =
αf • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(((((((## F (linvunitor f) ▹ fy)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy))
     • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy)
    • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf))
   • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f))
  • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f))
 • (lunitor fx ▹ # G f)) • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor f)) =
αf • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((((((## F (linvunitor f) ▹ fy)
     • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy)
   • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f))
 • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f))
• (lunitor fx ▹ # G f) = αf

      
B, C: bicat

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (linvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)
         • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G f)
            • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f)
               • (lunitor fx ▹ # G f)))))) = αf

      
B, C: bicat

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧

   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F f) fy
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ αf)

            • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) ▹ # G f)
               • (lunitor fx ▹ # G f)))))) = ?b

fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
?b = αf

B, C: bicat

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (linvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F f) ▹ fy)
      • ((lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy) • αf))) = αf

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((((## F (linvunitor f) ▹ fy)
   • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 ▹ fy))
  • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F f) ▹ fy))
 • (lunitor (# F f) ▹ fy)) • αf = αf

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((((## F (linvunitor f)
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1)
   • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F f))
  • lunitor (# F f)) ▹ fy) • αf = αf

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((((## F (linvunitor f)
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1)
   • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F f))
  • lunitor (# F f)) ▹ fy) • αf =
id₂ (# F f · fy) • αf

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(((## F (linvunitor f)
   • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1)
  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F f))
 • lunitor (# F f)) ▹ fy = id₂ (# F f · fy)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(((## F (linvunitor f)
   • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1)
  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F f))
 • lunitor (# F f)) ▹ fy = id₂ (# F f) ▹ fy

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((## F (linvunitor f)
  • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1)
 • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F f)) • lunitor (# F f) =
id₂ (# F f)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
## F (linvunitor f) =
((id₂ (# F f)
  • (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f)) ^-1)
 • (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (# F f)
      (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_id F x)))
   ^-1)
• (is_invertible_2cell_inv
     (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) ^-1

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
## F (linvunitor f) =
((id₂ (# F f) • linvunitor (# F f))
 • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F f))
• psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
## F (linvunitor f) =
(linvunitor (# F f) • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F f))
• psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f

      apply psfunctor_linvunitor.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] f' ;; id_disp y
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(y : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (f' : # F f · y ==> x · # G f),
(## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ y)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ b)) ^-1 ▹ y)
        • rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ b)) y)
       • (# F f
          ◃ (((((psfunctor_id F b) ^-1 ▹ y)
               • lunitor y) • rinvunitor y)
             • (y ◃ psfunctor_id G b))))
      • lassociator (# F f) y (# G (id₁ b)))
     • (f' ▹ # G (id₁ b)))
    • rassociator x (# G f) (# G (id₁ b)))
   • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ b))) =
f' • (x ◃ ## G (rinvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
        • rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy)
       • (# F f
          ◃ (((((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy)
               • lunitor fy) • rinvunitor fy)
             • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G y))))
      • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G (id₁ y)))
     • (αf ▹ # G (id₁ y)))
    • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y)))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) =
αf • (fx ◃ ## G (rinvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
        • rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy)
       • ((((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy))
            • (# F f ◃ lunitor fy))
           • (# F f ◃ rinvunitor fy))
          • (# F f ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G y))))
      • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G (id₁ y)))
     • (αf ▹ # G (id₁ y)))
    • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y)))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) =
αf • (fx ◃ ## G (rinvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy
      • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy))
         • ((# F f ◃ lunitor fy)
            • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor fy)
               • ((# F f ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
                  • (lassociator (# F f) fy
                       (# G (id₁ y))
                     • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
                        • (rassociator fx (# G f)
                             (# G (id₁ y))
                           • (fx
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G f
                                  (id₁ y))))))))))) =
αf • (fx ◃ ## G (rinvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy
      • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy))
         • ((# F f ◃ lunitor fy)
            • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor fy)
               • ((# F f ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
                  • (lassociator (# F f) fy
                       (# G (id₁ y))
                     • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
                        • (rassociator fx (# G f)
                             (# G (id₁ y))
                           • (fx
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G f
                                  (id₁ y))))))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
?b = αf • (fx ◃ ## G (rinvunitor f))

      • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy))
         • ((# F f ◃ lunitor fy)
            • ((# F f ◃ rinvunitor fy)
               • ((# F f ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
                  • (lassociator (# F f) fy
                       (# G (id₁ y))
                     • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
                        • (rassociator fx (# G f)
                             (# G (id₁ y))
                           • (fx
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G f
                                  (id₁ y))))))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧

(# F f ◃ rinvunitor fy)

   • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G (id₁ y))
      • ((αf ▹ # G (id₁ y))
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G (id₁ y))
            • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)))))) =

  • rassociator fx (# G f) (id₁ (G y)))
 • (fx ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((fx ◃ rinvunitor (# G f))
 • (fx ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_id G y)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
fx
◃ ((rinvunitor (# G f) • (# G f ◃ psfunctor_id G y))
   • psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
fx ◃ ## G (rinvunitor f) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy
      • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy))
         • ((# F f ◃ lunitor fy)
            • (αf • (fx ◃ ## G (rinvunitor f))))))) =
αf • (fx ◃ ## G (rinvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((((((## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
     • ((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy))
    • rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy)
   • (# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy)))
  • (# F f ◃ lunitor fy)) • αf)
• (fx ◃ ## G (rinvunitor f)) =
αf • (fx ◃ ## G (rinvunitor f))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(((((## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
    • ((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy))
   • rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy)
  • (# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy)))
 • (# F f ◃ lunitor fy)) • αf = αf

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(((((## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
    • ((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy))
   • rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy)
  • (# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy)))
 • (# F f ◃ lunitor fy)) • αf = id₂ (# F f · fy) • αf

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
((((## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
   • ((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy))
  • rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy)
 • (# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy)))
• (# F f ◃ lunitor fy) = id₂ (# F f · fy)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy
      • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy))
         • (# F f ◃ lunitor fy)))) = id₂ (# F f · fy)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy
      • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy))
         • (# F f ◃ lunitor fy)))) = ?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
?b = id₂ (# F f · fy)

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

   • (rassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ y)) fy
      • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy))
         • (# F f ◃ lunitor fy)))) = ?b

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

 • (# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 ▹ fy)))

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

(((# F f ◃ (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1) ▹ fy)
 • rassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F y)) fy)
• (# F f ◃ lunitor fy) = ?t2

   • (# F f ◃ lunitor fy)) = ?t2

• (# F f ◃ lunitor fy) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
runitor (# F f) ▹ fy = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (((# F f ◃ (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1) ▹ fy)
      • (runitor (# F f) ▹ fy))) = id₂ (# F f · fy)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
(((## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy)
  • ((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 ▹ fy))
 • ((# F f ◃ (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1) ▹ fy))
• (runitor (# F f) ▹ fy) = id₂ (# F f · fy)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy =
((id₂ (# F f · fy)
  • (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fy
       (is_invertible_2cell_runitor (# F f))) ^-1)
 • (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fy
      (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F f)
         (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_id F y))))
   ^-1)
• (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fy
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv
        (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)))) ^-1

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy =
((id₂ (# F f · fy) • (rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ fy))
 • ((# F f ◃ psfunctor_id F y) ▹ fy))
• (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ fy)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy =
((rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ fy)
 • ((# F f ◃ psfunctor_id F y) ▹ fy))
• (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y) ▹ fy)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ fy =
((rinvunitor (# F f) • (# F f ◃ psfunctor_id F y))
 • psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ▹ fy

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
## F (rinvunitor f) =
(rinvunitor (# F f) • (# F f ◃ psfunctor_id F y))
• psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)

      apply psfunctor_rinvunitor.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 c)
(z : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
(ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(x : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (y : C ⟦ F c, G c ⟧)
(z : C ⟦ F d, G d ⟧) (ff : # F f · x ==> w · # G f)
(gg : # F g · y ==> x · # G g)
(hh : # F h · z ==> y · # G h),
(## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ z)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ z)
        • rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) z)
       • (# F f
          ◃ ((((((... • ...) • (... ◃ hh))
                • lassociator (# F g) y (# G h))
               • (gg ▹ # G h))
              • rassociator x (# G g) (# G h))
             • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))
      • lassociator (# F f) x (# G (g · h)))
     • (ff ▹ # G (g · h)))
    • rassociator w (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
   • (w ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ z)
      • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) z)
     • (# F (f · g) ◃ hh))
    • lassociator (# F (f · g)) y (# G h))
   • (((((((((...) ^-1 ▹ y)
            • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) y)
           • (# F f ◃ gg))
          • lassociator (# F f) x (# G g))
         • (ff ▹ # G g))
        • rassociator w (# G f) (# G g))
       • (w ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
  • rassociator w (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
 • (w ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h))
• (w ◃ ## G (rassociator f g h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ fz)
        • rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz)
       • (# F f
          ◃ (((((((...) • rassociator ... ... fz)
                 • (# F g ◃ γh))
                • lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
               • (βg ▹ # G h))
              • rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
             • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))
      • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
     • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
    • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
   • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
     • (# F (f · g) ◃ γh))
    • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
   • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
            • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
           • (# F f ◃ βg))
          • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
         • (αf ▹ # G g))
        • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
       • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
  • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
 • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h))
• (fw ◃ ## G (rassociator f g h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ fz)
        • rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz)
       • (((((((# F f ◃ (...))
               • (# F f ◃ rassociator ... ... fz))
              • (# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ γh)))
             • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h)))
            • (# F f ◃ (βg ▹ # G h)))
           • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
          • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))
      • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
     • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
    • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
   • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
     • (# F (f · g) ◃ γh))
    • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
   • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
            • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
           • (# F f ◃ βg))
          • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
         • (αf ▹ # G g))
        • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
       • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
  • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
 • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h))
• (fw ◃ ## G (rassociator f g h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ fz)
        • rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz)
       • (((((((# F f ◃ (...))
               • (# F f ◃ rassociator ... ... fz))
              • (# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ γh)))
             • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h)))
            • (# F f ◃ (βg ▹ # G h)))
           • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
          • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))
      • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
     • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
    • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
   • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
     • (# F (f · g) ◃ γh))
    • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
   • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
           • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
          • ((# F f ◃ βg) ▹ # G h))
         • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
        • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
       • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h))
      • ((fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g) ▹ # G h)))
  • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
 • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h))
• (fw ◃ ## G (rassociator f g h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
• (((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ fz)
   • (rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz
      • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_comp F g h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
         • ((# F f ◃ rassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
            • ((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ γh))
               • ((# F f
                   ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
                  • ((# F f ◃ (βg ▹ # G h))
                     • ((# F f
                         ◃ rassociator fx (# G g)
                             (# G h))
                        • ((# F f
                            ◃ (fx
                               ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
                           • (lassociator (# F f) fx
                                (# G (g · h))
                              • ((αf ▹ # G ...)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
• (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
   • ((# F (f · g) ◃ γh)
      • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
         • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
            • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
               • (((# F f ◃ βg) ▹ # G h)
                  • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((rassociator fw (# G f)
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((fw
                                ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)
                               ▹ # G h)
                              • (rassociator fw
                                   (# G ...) (# G h)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fz
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv
      (psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h))) ^-1
• ((## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz
         • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_comp F g h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
            • ((# F f ◃ rassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
               • ((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ γh))
                  • ((# F f
                      ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
                     • ((# F f ◃ (βg ▹ # G h))
                        • ((# F f
                            ◃ rassociator fx (# G g)
                                (# G h))
                           • ((# F f
                               ◃ (fx
                                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G g
                                      h))
                              • (lassociator (# F f)
                                   fx (# G ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
• ((# F (f · g) ◃ γh)
   • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
      • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
         • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
            • (((# F f ◃ βg) ▹ # G h)
               • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                     • ((rassociator fw (# G f)
                           (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • (((fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)
                            ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                              • ((fw
                                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                      ... h)
                                 • (fw ◃ ## G ...))))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
• ((## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz
         • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_comp F g h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
            • ((# F f ◃ rassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
               • ((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ γh))
                  • ((# F f
                      ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
                     • ((# F f ◃ (βg ▹ # G h))
                        • ((# F f
                            ◃ rassociator fx (# G g)
                                (# G h))
                           • ((# F f
                               ◃ (fx
                                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G g
                                      h))
                              • (lassociator (# F f)
                                   fx (# G ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
• ((# F (f · g) ◃ γh)
   • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
      • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
         • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
            • (((# F f ◃ βg) ▹ # G h)
               • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                     • ((rassociator fw (# G f)
                           (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • (((fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)
                            ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                              • ((fw
                                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                      ... h)
                                 • (fw ◃ ## G ...))))))))))))

βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
• ((# F (f · g) ◃ γh)
   • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
      • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
         • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
            • (((# F f ◃ βg) ▹ # G h)
               • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                     • ((rassociator fw (# G f)
                           (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • (((fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)
                            ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                              • ((fw
                                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                      ... h)
                                 • (fw ◃ ## G ...)))))))))))) =
(psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
• ((## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz
         • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_comp F g h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
            • ((# F f ◃ rassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
               • ((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ γh))
                  • ((# F f
                      ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
                     • ((# F f ◃ (βg ▹ # G h))
                        • ((# F f
                            ◃ rassociator fx (# G g)
                                (# G h))
                           • ((# F f
                               ◃ (fx
                                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G g
                                      h))
                              • (lassociator (# F f)
                                   fx (# G ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

(psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)

   • (((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz
         • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_comp F g h) ^-1 ▹ fz))

               • ((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ γh))
                  • ((# F f
                      ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
                     • ((# F f ◃ (βg ▹ # G h))
                        • ((# F f
                            ◃ rassociator fx (# G g)
                                (# G h))
                           • ((# F f
                               ◃ (fx
                                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G g
                                      h))
                              • (lassociator (# F f)
                                   fx (# G ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧

βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F (f · g) ◃ γh)
• (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
   • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
      • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
         • (((# F f ◃ βg) ▹ # G h)
            • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
               • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g)
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)
                         ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                           • ((fw
                               ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                   (f · g) h)
                              • (fw
                                 ◃ ## G
                                     (rassociator f g
                                        h)))))))))))) =

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
