B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (# F f) (fx · # G g) (# G h)
• ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
      • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
         • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
            • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))))) =
(lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
• (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
   • ((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
      • (rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
         • ((fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h))
            • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (# G h)
   (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)))
^-1
• (rassociator (# F f) (fx · # G g) (# G h)
   • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
         • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
            • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
               • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h))))))) =
((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
• ((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
   • (rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
      • ((fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h))
         • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))

βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(rassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
• (rassociator (# F f) (fx · # G g) (# G h)
   • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
         • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
            • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
               • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h))))))) =
((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
• ((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
   • (rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
      • ((fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h))
         • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))

F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B

h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
• ((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
   • (rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
      • ((fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h))
         • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))

αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(rassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
• (rassociator (# F f) (fx · # G g) (# G h)
   • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
         • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
            • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((((rassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
     • rassociator (# F f) (fx · # G g) (# G h))
    • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
   • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
  • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
 • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
• rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((rassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
 • rassociator (# F f) (fx · # G g) (# G h))
• (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)) = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (# F f · fx) (# G g) (# G h)
• rassociator (# F f) fx (# G g · # G h) = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((rassociator (# F f · fx) (# G g) (# G h)
    • rassociator (# F f) fx (# G g · # G h))
   • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
  • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
 • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
• rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)) =
((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
• ((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
   • (rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
      • ((fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h))
         • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (# F f · fx) (# G g) (# G h)
• (rassociator (# F f) fx (# G g · # G h)
   • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
      • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
         • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
            • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))))) =
((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
• ((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
   • (rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
      • ((fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h))
         • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))

g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (# F f · fx) (# G g) (# G h)
• (rassociator (# F f) fx (# G g · # G h)
   • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
      • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
         • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
            • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))))) =
?b

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (# F f · fx) (# G g) (# G h)
• ((# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
   • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
      • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))) =
((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
• ((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
   • (rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
      • ((fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h))
         • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
• ((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
   • (rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
      • ((fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h))
         • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))) =
rassociator (# F f · fx) (# G g) (# G h)
• ((# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
   • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
      • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h))))

?b0

          
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
• (rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
   • ((fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h))
      • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))) = 
?t2

          
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
  • rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h))
 • (fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h)))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?t2

          
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
 • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g · # G h))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?t2

          
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
• (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g · # G h)
   • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
• (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
   • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g · # G h)
      • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))) = 
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
  • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g · # G h))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((rassociator (# F f · fx) (# G g) (# G h)
  • (αf ▹ # G g · # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g · # G h))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (# F f · fx) (# G g) (# G h)
• ((αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
   • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g · # G h)
      • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))) = 
?b

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (# F f · fx) (# G g) (# G h)
• ((αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
   • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g · # G h)
      • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))) =
rassociator (# F f · fx) (# G g) (# G h)
• ((# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
   • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
      • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
• (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g · # G h)
   • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))) =
(# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
• ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
   • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
• ((fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
   • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h))) =
(# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
• ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
   • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
 • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
• rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)) =
((# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
 • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
• rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) =
(# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
• (αf ▹ # G (g · h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
• (αf ▹ # G (g · h)) =
(# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
• (αf ▹ # G (g · h))

      reflexivity.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 c)
(z : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp ==>[
lassociator f g h] (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(x : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (y : C ⟦ F c, G c ⟧)
(z : C ⟦ F d, G d ⟧) (ff : # F f · x ==> w · # G f)
(gg : # F g · y ==> x · # G g)
(hh : # F h · z ==> y · # G h),
(## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ z)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ z)
        • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) z)
       • (# F (f · g) ◃ hh))
      • lassociator (# F (f · g)) y (# G h))
     • (((((((((...) ^-1 ▹ y)
              • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) y)
             • (# F f ◃ gg))
            • lassociator (# F f) x (# G g))
           • (ff ▹ # G g))
          • rassociator w (# G f) (# G g))
         • (w ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
    • rassociator w (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
   • (w ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ z)
      • rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) z)
     • (# F f
        ◃ ((((((... • ...) • (... ◃ hh))
              • lassociator (# F g) y (# G h))
             • (gg ▹ # G h))
            • rassociator x (# G g) (# G h))
           • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))
    • lassociator (# F f) x (# G (g · h)))
   • (ff ▹ # G (g · h)))
  • rassociator w (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
 • (w ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)))
• (w ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
        • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
       • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
      • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
     • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
              • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
             • (# F f ◃ αg))
            • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
           • (αf ▹ # G g))
          • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
         • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
    • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
   • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz)
     • (# F f
        ◃ (((((((...) • rassociator ... ... fz)
               • (# F g ◃ αh))
              • lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
             • (αg ▹ # G h))
            • rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
           • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))
    • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
  • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
 • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)))
• (fw ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
        • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
       • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
      • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
     • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
              • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
             • (# F f ◃ αg))
            • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
           • (αf ▹ # G g))
          • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
         • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
    • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
   • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz)
     • (((((((# F f ◃ (...))
             • (# F f ◃ rassociator ... ... fz))
            • (# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh)))
           • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h)))
          • (# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h)))
         • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
        • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))
    • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
  • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
 • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)))
• (fw ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
   • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
      • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
         • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
            • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                 • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                    • ((# F f ◃ αg)
                       • (lassociator (# F f) fx
                            (# G g)
                          • ((αf ▹ # G g)
                             • (rassociator fw ... ...
                                • (...))))))) ▹ # G h)
               • (rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                  • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h))))))) =
((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)) ^-1 ▹ fz)
• (rassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz
   • ((# F f ◃ ((psfunctor_comp F g h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
         • ((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
            • ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
               • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
                  • ((# F f
                      ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
                     • ((# F f
                         ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
                        • (lassociator (# F f) fx
                             (# G (g · h))
                           • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                              • (rassociator fw
                                   (# G f) (# G ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F f)
   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fz
      (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_comp F g h))))
^-1
• ((is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (# F f)
      (# F (g · h)) fz) ^-1
   • ((is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fz
         (is_invertible_2cell_inv
            (psfunctor_comp F f (g · h)))) ^-1
      • ((## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
         • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                  • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                       (# G h)
                     • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1
                           ▹ fy)
                          • (rassociator (# F f)
                               (# F g) fy
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                           • (fw
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (f · g) h)))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ rassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
• ((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
   • ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
            • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
               • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
                  • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                     • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                          (# G (g · h))
                        • ((fw
                            ◃ psfunctor_comp G f
                                (g · h))
                           • (fw
                              ◃ ## G
                                  (lassociator f g h)))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ (psfunctor_comp F g h ▹ fz))
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz
   • ((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h) ▹ fz)
      • ((## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
         • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                  • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                       (# G h)
                     • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1
                           ▹ fy)
                          • (rassociator (# F f)
                               (# F g) fy
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                           • (fw
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (f · g) h)))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ rassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
• ((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
   • ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
            • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
               • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
                  • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                     • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                          (# G (g · h))
                        • ((fw
                            ◃ psfunctor_comp G f
                                (g · h))
                           • (fw
                              ◃ ## G
                                  (lassociator f g h)))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ (psfunctor_comp F g h ▹ fz))
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz
   • ((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h) ▹ fz)
      • ((## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
         • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                  • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                       (# G h)
                     • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1
                           ▹ fy)
                          • (rassociator (# F f)
                               (# F g) fy
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                           • (fw
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (f · g) h)))))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
(# F f ◃ rassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
• ((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
   • ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
            • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
               • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
                  • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                     • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                          (# G (g · h))
                        • ((fw
                            ◃ psfunctor_comp G f
                                (g · h))
                           • (fw
                              ◃ ## G
                                  (lassociator f g h)))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ (psfunctor_comp F g h ▹ fz))
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz
   • ((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h) ▹ fz)
      • ((## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz)
         • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                  • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                       (# G h)
                     • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1
                           ▹ fy)
                          • (rassociator (# F f)
                               (# F g) fy
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                           • (fw
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (f · g) h)))))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((((((((# F f ◃ (psfunctor_comp F g h ▹ fz))
         • lassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) fz)
        • (psfunctor_comp F f (g · h) ▹ fz))
       • (## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz))
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
     • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
         • ((# F f ◃ psfunctor_comp F g h) ▹ fz))
        • (psfunctor_comp F f (g · h) ▹ fz))
       • (## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz))
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
     • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
         • ((# F f ◃ psfunctor_comp F g h) ▹ fz))
        • (psfunctor_comp F f (g · h) ▹ fz))
       • (## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz))
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
     • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?b0
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b0 = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
         • ((# F f ◃ psfunctor_comp F g h) ▹ fz))
        • (psfunctor_comp F f (g · h) ▹ fz))
       • (## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz))
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
     • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?b0

          
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
  • ((# F f ◃ psfunctor_comp F g h) ▹ fz))
 • (psfunctor_comp F f (g · h) ▹ fz))
• (## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz) = ?y'

          
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧

αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
• (((# F f ◃ psfunctor_comp F g h) ▹ fz)
   • ((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h) ▹ fz)
      • (## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz))) = ?y'

F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B

αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((# F f ◃ psfunctor_comp F g h) ▹ fz)
• ((psfunctor_comp F f (g · h) ▹ fz)
   • (## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz)) = ?t2

 • (psfunctor_comp F f (g · h) ▹ fz))
• (## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ fz) = ?t2

F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B

  • psfunctor_comp F f (g · h))
 • ## F (lassociator f g h)) ▹ fz = ?t2

          
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h)
  • (psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h))
 • psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ▹ fz = ?t2

          
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ fz)
 • ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz))
• (psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
       • (((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ fz)
           • ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz))
          • (psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)))
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
     • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
• ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
         • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                  • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                       (# G h)
                     • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1
                           ▹ fy)
                          • (rassociator (# F f)
                               (# F g) fy
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                           • (fw
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (f · g) h)))))))))) =
?b

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
• ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
         • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                  • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                       (# G h)
                     • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1
                           ▹ fy)
                          • (rassociator (# F f)
                               (# F g) fy
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                           • (fw
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (f · g) h)))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ rassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
• ((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
   • ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
            • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
               • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
                  • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                     • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                          (# G (g · h))
                        • ((fw
                            ◃ psfunctor_comp G f
                                (g · h))
                           • (fw
                              ◃ ## G
                                  (lassociator f g h)))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F f)
   (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz))
^-1
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
   • ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ fz)
      • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
            • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
               • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
                  • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                     • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                          (# G h)
                        • ((((... ^-1 ▹ fy)
                             • (rassociator ... ... fy
                                • (...))) ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                              • (fw
                                 ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                     (f · g) h))))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • ((fw
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))
                        • (fw
                           ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
   • ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ fz)
      • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
            • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
               • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
                  • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                     • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                          (# G h)
                        • ((((... ^-1 ▹ fy)
                             • (rassociator ... ... fy
                                • (...))) ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                              • (fw
                                 ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                     (f · g) h))))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • ((fw
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))
                        • (fw
                           ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
   • ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ fz)
      • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
            • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
               • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
                  • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                     • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                          (# G h)
                        • ((((... ^-1 ▹ fy)
                             • (rassociator ... ... fy
                                • (...))) ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                              • (fw
                                 ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                     (f · g) h))))))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • ((fw
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))
                        • (fw
                           ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz
   • ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ fz)
      • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
            • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
               • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
                  • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                     • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                          (# G h)
                        • ((((... ^-1 ▹ fy)
                             • (rassociator ... ... fy
                                • (...))) ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                              • (fw
                                 ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                     (f · g) h))))))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) fz)
          • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) fz)
         • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ fz))
        • ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz))
       • (psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz))
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
     • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
         • lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz)
        • ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz))
       • (psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz))
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
     • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
         • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                  • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                       (# G h)
                     • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1
                           ▹ fy)
                          • (rassociator (# F f)
                               (# F g) fy
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                           • (fw
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (f · g) h)))))))))) =
?b

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
         • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                  • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                       (# G h)
                     • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1
                           ▹ fy)
                          • (rassociator (# F f)
                               (# F g) fy
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                           • (fw
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (f · g) h)))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • ((fw
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))
                        • (fw
                           ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
         • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                  • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                       (# G h)
                     • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1
                           ▹ fy)
                          • (rassociator (# F f)
                               (# F g) fy
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                           • (fw
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (f · g) h)))))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • ((fw
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))
                        • (fw
                           ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
         • (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
                  • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy
                       (# G h)
                     • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1
                           ▹ fy)
                          • (rassociator (# F f)
                               (# F g) fy
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                           • (fw
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                  (f · g) h)))))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz)
   • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
      • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
         • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
            • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                 • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                    • ((# F f ◃ αg)
                       • (lassociator (# F f) fx
                            (# G g)
                          • ((αf ▹ # G g)
                             • (rassociator fw ... ...
                                • (...))))))) ▹ # G h)
               • (rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
                  • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h))))))) =
?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h ▹ fz)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1 ▹ fz))
     • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h
       • (psfunctor_comp F (f · g) h) ^-1) ▹ fz)
     • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((((id₂ (# F (f · g) · # F h) ▹ fz)
     • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((id₂ (# F (f · g) · # F h · fz)
     • rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz)
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (((((rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
             • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
            • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
           • ((((((((...) • rassociator ... ... fy)
                   • (# F f ◃ αg))
                  • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
                 • (αf ▹ # G g))
                • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
               • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
          • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
         • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • ((fw
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))
                        • (fw
                           ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (((((rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
             • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
            • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
           • ((((((((...) • rassociator ... ... fy)
                   • (# F f ◃ αg))
                  • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
                 • (αf ▹ # G g))
                • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
               • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
          • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
         • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)))) = 
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • ((fw
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))
                        • (fw
                           ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (((((rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
             • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
            • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
           • ((((((((...) • rassociator ... ... fy)
                   • (# F f ◃ αg))
                  • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
                 • (αf ▹ # G g))
                • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
               • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
          • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
         • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)))) = 
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
    • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
   • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
  • (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy)
          • (# F f ◃ αg))
         • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g))
        • (αf ▹ # G g))
       • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g))
      • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
• ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
   • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
      • (((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
           • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
              • ((# F f ◃ αg)
                 • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                    • ((αf ▹ # G g)
                       • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                            (# G g)
                          • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)))))))
          ▹ # G h)
         • (rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
            • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h))))) =
?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧

fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
  • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
     • ((# F f ◃ αg)
        • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
           • ((αf ▹ # G g)
              • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g)
                 • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g)))))))
 ▹ # G h)
• (rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
   • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
 • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
    • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
       • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
          • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
             • ((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g)
                 ▹ # G h)
                • ((fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g) ▹ # G h)))))))
• (rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
   • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B

αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
• ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
   • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
      • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
         • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
            • ((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
               • (((fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g) ▹ # G h)
                  • (rassociator fw (# G (f · g))
                       (# G h)
                     • (fw
                        ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)))))))) =
?t2

((fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g) ▹ # G h)
• (rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h)
   • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)) = ?t2

(((fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g) ▹ # G h)
 • rassociator fw (# G (f · g)) (# G h))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
 • (fw ◃ (psfunctor_comp G f g ▹ # G h)))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
• ((fw ◃ (psfunctor_comp G f g ▹ # G h))
   • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • ((fw
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))
                        • (fw
                           ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • ((fw
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))
                        • (fw
                           ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h)))))))))) =
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...)))))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • ((fw
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))
                        • (fw
                           ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h)))))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...)))))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • ((fw
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))
                        • (fw
                           ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h)))))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
        • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h)))
       • (# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h)))
      • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
     • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
    • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
  • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
 • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)))
• (fw ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h)) = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
        • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h)))
       • (# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h)))
      • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
     • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
    • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
  • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
 • (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)))
• (fw ◃ ## G (lassociator f g h)) =
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...)))))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
is_invertible_2cell (## G (lassociator f g h))
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((((((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
       • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h)))
      • (# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h)))
     • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
    • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
   • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
  • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
 • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)) =
(lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
 • (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
    • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
       • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
          • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
             • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
                • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                    ▹ # G h)
                   • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                       ▹ # G h)
                      • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                         • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                               (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                            • (((...) ▹ # G h)
                               • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker fw ?Goal3) ^-1

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧

fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((((((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
       • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h)))
      • (# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h)))
     • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
    • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
   • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
  • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
 • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)) =
(lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
 • (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
    • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
       • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
          • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
             • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
                • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                    ▹ # G h)
                   • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                       ▹ # G h)
                      • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                         • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                               (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                            • (((...) ▹ # G h)
                               • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker fw
     (psfunctor_is_iso G
        (lassociator f g h,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h))) ^-1

(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))

                        ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))))))))) =
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz

                   ▹ # G h)

                      ▹ # G h)

                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...)))))))))))))

• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)

                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx

                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • (fw
                        ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)))))))))

• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(fw ◃ (psfunctor_comp G f g ▹ # G h))
• ((fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)
   • (fw ◃ ## G (rassociator f g h))) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
fw
◃ ((psfunctor_comp G f g ▹ # G h)
   • (psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h
      • ## G (rassociator f g h))) = ?t2

w, x, y, z: B
