fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
fw
◃ (((psfunctor_comp G f g ▹ # G h)
    • psfunctor_comp G (f · g) h)
   • ## G (rassociator f g h)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
fw
◃ ((rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h)
    • (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
   • psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • (fw
                        ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • (rassociator fw (# G f)
                       (# G (g · h))
                     • (fw
                        ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((((((...) • rassociator ... ... fz)
           • (# F ... ◃ αh))
          • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
         • (((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h))
        • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
       • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
      • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
     • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
    • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h))
   • rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h))
  • (fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h)))
 • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h)) =
((((((((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
       • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h)))
      • (# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h)))
     • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
    • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
   • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
  • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
 • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)))
• (fw ◃ psfunctor_comp G f (g · h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((((((...) • (...))
           • rassociator (# F ...) (# F h) fz)
          • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
         • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
        • (((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h))
       • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
     • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
    • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
   • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h))
 • (fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h)))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) =
(((((((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
      • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h)))
     • (# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h)))
    • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
   • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
  • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
 • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
• rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • rassociator fw (# G f)
                      (# G (g · h))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • rassociator fw (# G f)
                      (# G (g · h))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h) ▹ fz)
• (rassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) fz
   • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
      • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
         • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
            • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
               • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                  • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((rassociator fw (# G f)
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G f · # G g)
                                (# G h)
                              • ((fw
                                  ◃ rassociator ...
                                      ... ...)
                                 • (fw ◃ (...))))))))))))) =
?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((((((...) ▹ fz)
           • rassociator (# F ...) (# F h) fz)
          • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
         • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
        • (((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h))
       • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
     • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
    • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
   • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h))
 • (fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h)))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((((rassociator (... · ...) (# F h) fz
           • (psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ ... · fz))
          • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
         • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
        • (((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h))
       • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
     • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
    • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
   • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h))
 • (fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h)))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
• ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
   • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
      • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
         • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
            • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
               • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                  • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((rassociator fw (# G f)
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G f · # G g)
                                (# G h)
                              • ((fw
                                  ◃ rassociator ...
                                      ... ...)
                                 • (fw ◃ (...))))))))))))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (rassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
      • ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • rassociator fw (# G f)
                      (# G (g · h))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (rassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
      • ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • rassociator fw (# G f)
                      (# G (g · h))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • (rassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
      • ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
         • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
            • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
               • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • ((rassociator fw ...
                                    ... ▹ # G h)
                                 • (rassociator fw ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
• (rassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) fz
   • ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
      • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
         • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
            • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                ▹ # G h)
               • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                     • ((lassociator (# F f) fx
                           (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • ((rassociator fw (# G f)
                                 (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                              • (rassociator fw
                                   (... · ...) (# G h)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((((((((((lassociator ... ... fz
            • rassociator ... ... fz)
           • (psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ ... · fz))
          • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
         • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
        • (((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h))
       • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
     • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
    • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
   • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h))
 • (fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h)))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((((id₂ (... · ...)
           • (psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ ... · fz))
          • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
         • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
        • (((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h))
       • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
     • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
    • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
   • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h))
 • (fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h)))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
          • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
         • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
        • (((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h))
       • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
     • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
    • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
   • (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h))
 • (fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h)))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
• ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
   • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
      • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
         • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
            • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
               • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                     • ((rassociator fw (# G f)
                           (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator fw
                             (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
                           • ((fw
                               ◃ rassociator (# G f)
                                   (# G g) (# G h))
                              • (fw
                                 ◃ (# G f
                                    ◃ psfunctor_comp G
                                        g h)))))))))))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
   • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
      • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
         • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
            • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
               • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                  • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((rassociator fw (# G f)
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G f · # G g)
                                (# G h)
                              • ((fw
                                  ◃ rassociator ...
                                      ... ...)
                                 • (fw ◃ (...))))))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • rassociator fw (# G f)
                      (# G (g · h))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
   • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
      • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
         • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
            • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
               • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                  • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((rassociator fw (# G f)
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G f · # G g)
                                (# G h)
                              • ((fw
                                  ◃ rassociator ...
                                      ... ...)
                                 • (fw ◃ (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • rassociator fw (# G f)
                      (# G (g · h))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
   • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
      • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
         • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
            • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
               • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                  • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • ((rassociator fw (# G f)
                              (# G g) ▹ # G h)
                           • (rassociator fw
                                (# G f · # G g)
                                (# G h)
                              • ((fw
                                  ◃ rassociator ...
                                      ... ...)
                                 • (fw ◃ (...))))))))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
• (rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h)
   • ((fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h))
      • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))) = 
?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g) ▹ # G h)
  • rassociator fw (# G f · # G g) (# G h))
 • (fw ◃ rassociator (# G f) (# G g) (# G h)))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
 • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g · # G h))
• (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
• (rassociator fw (# G f) (# G g · # G h)
   • (fw ◃ (# G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
• ((fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
   • rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
   • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
      • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
         • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
            • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
               • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                  • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator (fw · # G f)
                             (# G g) (# G h)
                           • ((fw · # G f
                               ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
                              • rassociator fw (# G f)
                                  (# G (g · h)))))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • ((αf ▹ # G (g · h))
                  • rassociator fw (# G f)
                      (# G (g · h))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((((((((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
          • (psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz))
         • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
        • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
       • (((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h))
      • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
     • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
    • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
   • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
  • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
 • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
• rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h)) =
(((((((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
      • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h)))
     • (# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h)))
    • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
   • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
  • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
 • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))
• rassociator fw (# G f) (# G (g · h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
         • (psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz))
        • (# F (f · g) ◃ αh))
       • lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h))
      • (((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h))
     • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
    • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) =
((((((# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
     • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h)))
    • (# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h)))
   • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
  • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
 • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
• (αf ▹ # G (g · h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
   • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
      • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
         • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
            • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
               • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                  • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator (fw · # G f)
                             (# G g) (# G h)
                           • (fw · # G f
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
   • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
      • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
         • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
            • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
               • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                  • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator (fw · # G f)
                             (# G g) (# G h)
                           • (fw · # G f
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• ((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
   • ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
      • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
         • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
            • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
               • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
                  • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                      ▹ # G h)
                     • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                        • (rassociator (fw · # G f)
                             (# G g) (# G h)
                           • (fw · # G f
                              ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
• ((# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
   • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
      • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)
         • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
            • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
               • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g)
                   ▹ # G h)
                  • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                     • (rassociator (fw · # G f)
                          (# G g) (# G h)
                        • (fw · # G f
                           ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))))))) =
?t2

   • (lassociator (# F (f · g)) fy (# G h)
      • ((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G h)

αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F (f · g) ◃ αh)
• (((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ fy · # G h)
         • lassociator (# F f · # F g) fy (# G h))
        • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
       • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
      • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
     • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
    • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
   • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) = ?t20

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ # F h · fz)
        • ((psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1 ▹ # F h · fz))
       • (# F f · # F g ◃ αh))
      • lassociator (# F f · # F g) fy (# G h))
     • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
    • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g
         • (psfunctor_comp F f g) ^-1) ▹ # F h · fz)
       • (# F f · # F g ◃ αh))
      • lassociator (# F f · # F g) fy (# G h))
     • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
    • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) = ?t2

F, G: psfunctor B C

αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((((((id₂ (# F f · # F g) ▹ # F h · fz)
       • (# F f · # F g ◃ αh))
      • lassociator (# F f · # F g) fy (# G h))
     • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
    • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) = ?t2

αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((id₂ (# F f · # F g · (# F h · fz))
       • (# F f · # F g ◃ αh))
      • lassociator (# F f · # F g) fy (# G h))
     • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
    • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((((# F f · # F g ◃ αh)
      • lassociator (# F f · # F g) fy (# G h))
     • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
    • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f · # F g ◃ αh)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) fy (# G h)
   • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
      • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
         • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
            • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
               • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g)
                    (# G h)
                  • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• ((# F f · # F g ◃ αh)
   • (lassociator (# F f · # F g) fy (# G h)
      • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
         • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
            • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
               • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                  • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g)
                       (# G h)
                     • (fw · # G f
                        ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))))) =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · fz)
• ((# F f · # F g ◃ αh)
   • (lassociator (# F f · # F g) fy (# G h)
      • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
         • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
            • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
               • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                  • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g)
                       (# G h)
                     • (fw · # G f
                        ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
(# F f ◃ (# F g ◃ αh))
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
         • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
            • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
               • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))))))

F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (fy · # G h)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) fy (# G h)
   • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
      • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
         • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
            • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)

                    (# G h)
                  • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))))) =
(# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
• ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
         • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
            • (αf ▹ # G (g · h))))))

fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g · fy) (# G h)
   • ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
      • ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
         • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
            • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
               • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
                  • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g)
                       (# G h)
                     • (fw · # G f
                        ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(lassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
• ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
   • (((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
      • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
         • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
            • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g)
                 (# G h)
               • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))))) =
?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h)
     • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy ▹ # G h))
    • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy
      • rassociator (# F f) (# F g) fy) ▹ # G h)
    • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((id₂ (# F f · (# F g · fy)) ▹ # G h)
    • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((id₂ (# F f · (# F g · fy) · # G h)
    • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g · fy) (# G h)
   • ((((((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
         • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
        • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
       • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
      • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))) =
(# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) fy (# G h))
• ((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
      • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
         • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
            • (αf ▹ # G (g · h))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (# F g · fy) (# G h)
• ((((((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h)
      • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
     • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
    • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
   • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)) =
(# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
• ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
      • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
         • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((((lassociator (# F f) (# F g · fy) (# G h)
    • ((# F f ◃ αg) ▹ # G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) =
((((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
   • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
  • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
 • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
• (αf ▹ # G (g · h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
    • lassociator (# F f) (fx · # G g) (# G h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h))
  • ((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) =
((((# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
   • (# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
  • (# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))
 • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
• (αf ▹ # G (g · h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
• (lassociator (# F f) (fx · # G g) (# G h)
   • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
      • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
         • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
            • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))) =
(# F f ◃ (αg ▹ # G h))
• ((# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
   • ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
      • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
         • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) (fx · # G g) (# G h)
• ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
   • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
      • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
         • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))) =
(# F f ◃ rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h))
• ((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
      • (αf ▹ # G (g · h))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F f)
   (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator fx (# G g) (# G h)))
^-1
• (lassociator (# F f) (fx · # G g) (# G h)
   • ((lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g) ▹ # G h)
      • (((αf ▹ # G g) ▹ # G h)
         • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
            • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))) =
(# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
• (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))

F, G: psfunctor B C

   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))

B, C: bicat

f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(((αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
  • lassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
• (lassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
   • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
      • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g · # G h)
• ((αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
   • (lassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
      • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
         • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))) =
(# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
• (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
• (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h))) =
lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g · # G h)
• ((αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
   • (lassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
      • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
         • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
• (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h))) = ?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
?b =
lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g · # G h)
• ((αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
   • (lassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
      • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
         • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
• (lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h))
   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h))) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
((# F f ◃ (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))
 • lassociator (# F f) fx (# G (g · h)))
• (αf ▹ # G (g · h)) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g · # G h)
 • (# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g · # G h)
• ((# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h))) = ?b

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g · # G h)
• ((# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
   • (αf ▹ # G (g · h))) =
lassociator (# F f) fx (# G g · # G h)
• ((αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
   • (lassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
      • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
         • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(# F f · fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)
• (αf ▹ # G (g · h)) =
(αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
• (lassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
   • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
      • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
(αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h) =
(αf ▹ # G g · # G h)
• (lassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
   • (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
      • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
