fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h =
lassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
• (rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
   • (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h =
(lassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h)
 • rassociator (fw · # G f) (# G g) (# G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h =
id₂ (fw · # G f · (# G g · # G h))
• (fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
fw: C ⟦ F w, G w ⟧
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fx ==> fw · # G f
αg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
αh: # F h · fz ==> fy · # G h
fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h =
fw · # G f ◃ psfunctor_comp G g h

      apply idpath.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f g h : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h) (x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f g h : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h) (x : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(y : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (ff : # F f · y ==> x · # G f)
(gg : # F g · y ==> x · # G g)
(hh : # F h · y ==> x · # G h),
disp_inserter_disp_cat_2cell a b f g r x y ff gg
→ disp_inserter_disp_cat_2cell a b g h s x y gg hh
  → (## F (r • s) ▹ y) • hh = ff • (x ◃ ## G (r • s))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b : B) (f g h : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h) (x : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(y : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (ff : # F f · y ==> x · # G f)
(gg : # F g · y ==> x · # G g)
(hh : # F h · y ==> x · # G h),
(## F r ▹ y) • gg = ff • (x ◃ ## G r)
→ (## F s ▹ y) • hh = gg • (x ◃ ## G s)
  → (## F (r • s) ▹ y) • hh = ff • (x ◃ ## G (r • s))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fy ==> fx · # G h
p: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
q: (## F β ▹ fy) • γh = βg • (fx ◃ ## G β)
(## F (α • β) ▹ fy) • γh = αf • (fx ◃ ## G (α • β))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fy ==> fx · # G h
p: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
q: (## F β ▹ fy) • γh = βg • (fx ◃ ## G β)
((## F α • ## F β) ▹ fy) • γh =
αf • (fx ◃ (## G α • ## G β))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fy ==> fx · # G h
p: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
q: (## F β ▹ fy) • γh = βg • (fx ◃ ## G β)
((## F α ▹ fy) • (## F β ▹ fy)) • γh =
αf • (fx ◃ (## G α • ## G β))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fy ==> fx · # G h
p: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
q: (## F β ▹ fy) • γh = βg • (fx ◃ ## G β)
((## F α ▹ fy) • (## F β ▹ fy)) • γh =
αf • ((fx ◃ ## G α) • (fx ◃ ## G β))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fy ==> fx · # G h
p: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
q: (## F β ▹ fy) • γh = βg • (fx ◃ ## G β)
(## F α ▹ fy) • ((## F β ▹ fy) • γh) =
αf • ((fx ◃ ## G α) • (fx ◃ ## G β))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fy ==> fx · # G h
p: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
q: (## F β ▹ fy) • γh = βg • (fx ◃ ## G β)
(## F α ▹ fy) • (βg • (fx ◃ ## G β)) =
αf • ((fx ◃ ## G α) • (fx ◃ ## G β))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fy ==> fx · # G h
p: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
q: (## F β ▹ fy) • γh = βg • (fx ◃ ## G β)
((## F α ▹ fy) • βg) • (fx ◃ ## G β) =
αf • ((fx ◃ ## G α) • (fx ◃ ## G β))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fy ==> fx · # G h
p: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
q: (## F β ▹ fy) • γh = βg • (fx ◃ ## G β)
(αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)) • (fx ◃ ## G β) =
αf • ((fx ◃ ## G α) • (fx ◃ ## G β))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg: # F g · fy ==> fx · # G g
γh: # F h · fy ==> fx · # G h
p: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
q: (## F β ▹ fy) • γh = βg • (fx ◃ ## G β)
αf • ((fx ◃ ## G α) • (fx ◃ ## G β)) =
αf • ((fx ◃ ## G α) • (fx ◃ ## G β))

      reflexivity.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2) (x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b)
(z : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg1 : y -->[ g1] z) (gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2) (x : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(y : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (z : C ⟦ F c, G c ⟧)
(ff : # F f · y ==> x · # G f)
(gg1 : # F g1 · z ==> y · # G g1)
(gg2 : # F g2 · z ==> y · # G g2),
disp_inserter_disp_cat_2cell b c g1 g2 r y z gg1 gg2
→ disp_inserter_disp_cat_2cell a c (f · g1) (f · g2)
    (f ◃ r) x z
    ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g1) ^-1 ▹ z)
          • rassociator (# F f) (# F g1) z)
         • (# F f ◃ gg1))
        • lassociator (# F f) y (# G g1))
       • (ff ▹ # G g1))
      • rassociator x (# G f) (# G g1))
     • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g1))
    ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g2) ^-1 ▹ z)
          • rassociator (# F f) (# F g2) z)
         • (# F f ◃ gg2))
        • lassociator (# F f) y (# G g2))
       • (ff ▹ # G g2))
      • rassociator x (# G f) (# G g2))
     • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g2))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2) (x : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(y : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (z : C ⟦ F c, G c ⟧)
(ff : # F f · y ==> x · # G f)
(gg1 : # F g1 · z ==> y · # G g1)
(gg2 : # F g2 · z ==> y · # G g2),
(## F r ▹ z) • gg2 = gg1 • (y ◃ ## G r)
→ (## F (f ◃ r) ▹ z)
  • ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g2) ^-1 ▹ z)
          • rassociator (# F f) (# F g2) z)
         • (# F f ◃ gg2))
        • lassociator (# F f) y (# G g2))
       • (ff ▹ # G g2))
      • rassociator x (# G f) (# G g2))
     • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g2)) =
  ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g1) ^-1 ▹ z)
        • rassociator (# F f) (# F g1) z)
       • (# F f ◃ gg1))
      • lassociator (# F f) y (# G g1))
     • (ff ▹ # G g1)) • rassociator x (# G f) (# G g1))
   • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g1)) • (x ◃ ## G (f ◃ r))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(## F (f ◃ α) ▹ fz)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g₂) ^-1 ▹ fz)
        • rassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) fz)
       • (# F f ◃ βg₂))
      • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂))
     • (αf ▹ # G g₂))
    • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g₁) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • rassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) fz)
     • (# F f ◃ βg₁))
    • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)) • (αf ▹ # G g₁))
  • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(## F (f ◃ α) ▹ fz)
• (((psfunctor_comp F f g₂) ^-1 ▹ fz)
   • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) fz
      • ((# F f ◃ βg₂)
         • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)
            • ((αf ▹ # G g₂)
               • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
                  • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂))))))) =
((psfunctor_comp F f g₁) ^-1 ▹ fz)
• (rassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) fz
   • ((# F f ◃ βg₁)
      • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
         • ((αf ▹ # G g₁)
            • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
               • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
                  • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fz
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_comp F f g₁)))
^-1
• ((## F (f ◃ α) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g₂) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) fz
         • ((# F f ◃ βg₂)
            • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)
               • ((αf ▹ # G g₂)
                  • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
                     • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂)))))))) =
rassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) fz
• ((# F f ◃ βg₁)
   • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
      • ((αf ▹ # G g₁)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(psfunctor_comp F f g₁ ▹ fz)
• ((## F (f ◃ α) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g₂) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) fz
         • ((# F f ◃ βg₂)
            • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)
               • ((αf ▹ # G g₂)
                  • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
                     • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂)))))))) =
rassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) fz
• ((# F f ◃ βg₁)
   • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
      • ((αf ▹ # G g₁)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(psfunctor_comp F f g₁ ▹ fz)
• ((## F (f ◃ α) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g₂) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) fz
         • ((# F f ◃ βg₂)
            • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)
               • ((αf ▹ # G g₂)
                  • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
                     • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂)))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
?b =
rassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) fz
• ((# F f ◃ βg₁)
   • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
      • ((αf ▹ # G g₁)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(psfunctor_comp F f g₁ ▹ fz)
• ((## F (f ◃ α) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f g₂) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) fz
         • ((# F f ◃ βg₂)
            • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)
               • ((αf ▹ # G g₂)
                  • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
                     • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂)))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
((((((((psfunctor_comp F f g₁ ▹ fz)
       • (## F (f ◃ α) ▹ fz))
      • ((psfunctor_comp F f g₂) ^-1 ▹ fz))
     • rassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) fz)
    • (# F f ◃ βg₂)) • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂))
  • (αf ▹ # G g₂)) • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
((psfunctor_comp F f g₁ ▹ fz) • (## F (f ◃ α) ▹ fz))
• ((psfunctor_comp F f g₂) ^-1 ▹ fz) = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
((psfunctor_comp F f g₁ • ## F (f ◃ α))
 • (psfunctor_comp F f g₂) ^-1) ▹ fz = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(((# F f ◃ ## F α) • psfunctor_comp F f g₂)
 • (psfunctor_comp F f g₂) ^-1) ▹ fz = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
((# F f ◃ ## F α)
 • (psfunctor_comp F f g₂
    • (psfunctor_comp F f g₂) ^-1)) ▹ fz = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
((# F f ◃ ## F α) • id₂ (# F f · # F g₂)) ▹ fz = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(# F f ◃ ## F α) ▹ fz = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(((((((# F f ◃ ## F α) ▹ fz)
     • rassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) fz)
    • (# F f ◃ βg₂)) • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂))
  • (αf ▹ # G g₂)) • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
rassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) fz
• ((# F f ◃ βg₁)
   • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
      • ((αf ▹ # G g₁)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(((((rassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) fz
     • (# F f ◃ (## F α ▹ fz))) • (# F f ◃ βg₂))
   • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)) • (αf ▹ # G g₂))
 • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
rassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) fz
• ((# F f ◃ βg₁)
   • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
      • ((αf ▹ # G g₁)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
rassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) fz
• ((# F f ◃ (## F α ▹ fz))
   • ((# F f ◃ βg₂)
      • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)
         • ((αf ▹ # G g₂)
            • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
               • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂)))))) =
rassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) fz
• ((# F f ◃ βg₁)
   • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
      • ((αf ▹ # G g₁)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(# F f ◃ (## F α ▹ fz))
• ((# F f ◃ βg₂)
   • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)
      • ((αf ▹ # G g₂)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
            • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂))))) =
(# F f ◃ βg₁)
• (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
   • ((αf ▹ # G g₁)
      • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
         • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
            • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(((((# F f ◃ (## F α ▹ fz)) • (# F f ◃ βg₂))
   • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)) • (αf ▹ # G g₂))
 • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
(((((# F f ◃ βg₁) • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁))
   • (αf ▹ # G g₁)) • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
((((# F f ◃ ((## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂))
   • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)) • (αf ▹ # G g₂))
 • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
(((((# F f ◃ βg₁) • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁))
   • (αf ▹ # G g₁)) • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
((((# F f ◃ (βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)))
   • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)) • (αf ▹ # G g₂))
 • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
(((((# F f ◃ βg₁) • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁))
   • (αf ▹ # G g₁)) • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(((((# F f ◃ βg₁) • (# F f ◃ (fy ◃ ## G α)))
   • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)) • (αf ▹ # G g₂))
 • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
(((((# F f ◃ βg₁) • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁))
   • (αf ▹ # G g₁)) • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(# F f ◃ βg₁)
• ((# F f ◃ (fy ◃ ## G α))
   • (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)
      • ((αf ▹ # G g₂)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
            • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂))))) =
(# F f ◃ βg₁)
• (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
   • ((αf ▹ # G g₁)
      • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
         • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
            • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(# F f ◃ (fy ◃ ## G α))
• (lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)
   • ((αf ▹ # G g₂)
      • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
         • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂)))) =
lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
• ((αf ▹ # G g₁)
   • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
         • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
((((# F f ◃ (fy ◃ ## G α))
   • lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₂)) • (αf ▹ # G g₂))
 • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
(((lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁) • (αf ▹ # G g₁))
  • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(((lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
   • (# F f · fy ◃ ## G α)) • (αf ▹ # G g₂))
 • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
(((lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁) • (αf ▹ # G g₁))
  • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))

F, G: psfunctor B C

α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
lassociator (# F f) fy (# G g₁)
• ((# F f · fy ◃ ## G α)
   • ((αf ▹ # G g₂)
      • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
         • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂)))) =

• ((αf ▹ # G g₁)
   • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
         • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(# F f · fy ◃ ## G α)
• ((αf ▹ # G g₂)
   • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂))) =
(αf ▹ # G g₁)
• (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
   • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
      • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))))

F, G: psfunctor B C

βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(((# F f · fy ◃ ## G α) • (αf ▹ # G g₂))
 • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(((αf ▹ # G g₁) • (fx · # G f ◃ ## G α))
 • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
(((αf ▹ # G g₁) • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(αf ▹ # G g₁)
• ((fx · # G f ◃ ## G α)
   • (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂))) =
(αf ▹ # G g₁)
• (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
   • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)
      • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(fx · # G f ◃ ## G α)
• (rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂)
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂)) =
rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
• ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
((fx · # G f ◃ ## G α)
 • rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₂))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
(rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
 • (fx ◃ (# G f ◃ ## G α)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
(rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁)) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
• ((fx ◃ (# G f ◃ ## G α))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂)) =
rassociator fx (# G f) (# G g₁)
• ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(fx ◃ (# G f ◃ ## G α)) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
(fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f g₁) • (fx ◃ ## G (f ◃ α))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
fx ◃ ((# G f ◃ ## G α) • psfunctor_comp G f g₂) =
fx ◃ (psfunctor_comp G f g₁ • ## G (f ◃ α))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(# G f ◃ ## G α) • psfunctor_comp G f g₂ =
psfunctor_comp G f g₁ • ## G (f ◃ α)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf: # F f · fy ==> fx · # G f
βg₁: # F g₁ · fz ==> fy · # G g₁
βg₂: # F g₂ · fz ==> fy · # G g₂
hα: (## F α ▹ fz) • βg₂ = βg₁ • (fy ◃ ## G α)
(# G f ◃ ## G α) • psfunctor_comp G f g₂ =
(# G f ◃ ## G α) • psfunctor_comp G f g₂

      apply idpath.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c : B) (f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : f1 ==> f2) (x : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 b)
(z : disp_inserter_prebicat_1 c) (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y)
(ff2 : x -->[ f2] y) (gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c : B) (f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : f1 ==> f2) (x : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(y : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (z : C ⟦ F c, G c ⟧)
(ff1 : # F f1 · y ==> x · # G f1)
(ff2 : # F f2 · y ==> x · # G f2)
(gg : # F g · z ==> y · # G g),
disp_inserter_disp_cat_2cell a b f1 f2 r x y ff1 ff2
→ disp_inserter_disp_cat_2cell a c (f1 · g) (f2 · g)
    (r ▹ g) x z
    ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f1 g) ^-1 ▹ z)
          • rassociator (# F f1) (# F g) z)
         • (# F f1 ◃ gg))
        • lassociator (# F f1) y (# G g))
       • (ff1 ▹ # G g))
      • rassociator x (# G f1) (# G g))
     • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G f1 g))
    ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f2 g) ^-1 ▹ z)
          • rassociator (# F f2) (# F g) z)
         • (# F f2 ◃ gg))
        • lassociator (# F f2) y (# G g))
       • (ff2 ▹ # G g))
      • rassociator x (# G f2) (# G g))
     • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G f2 g))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (a b c : B) (f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : f1 ==> f2) (x : C ⟦ F a, G a ⟧)
(y : C ⟦ F b, G b ⟧) (z : C ⟦ F c, G c ⟧)
(ff1 : # F f1 · y ==> x · # G f1)
(ff2 : # F f2 · y ==> x · # G f2)
(gg : # F g · z ==> y · # G g),
(## F r ▹ y) • ff2 = ff1 • (x ◃ ## G r)
→ (## F (r ▹ g) ▹ z)
  • ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f2 g) ^-1 ▹ z)
          • rassociator (# F f2) (# F g) z)
         • (# F f2 ◃ gg))
        • lassociator (# F f2) y (# G g))
       • (ff2 ▹ # G g))
      • rassociator x (# G f2) (# G g))
     • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G f2 g)) =
  ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f1 g) ^-1 ▹ z)
        • rassociator (# F f1) (# F g) z)
       • (# F f1 ◃ gg))
      • lassociator (# F f1) y (# G g))
     • (ff1 ▹ # G g)) • rassociator x (# G f1) (# G g))
   • (x ◃ psfunctor_comp G f1 g)) • (x ◃ ## G (r ▹ g))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(## F (α ▹ g) ▹ fz)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F f₂ g) ^-1 ▹ fz)
        • rassociator (# F f₂) (# F g) fz)
       • (# F f₂ ◃ βg))
      • lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g))
     • (αf₂ ▹ # G g))
    • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F f₁ g) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • rassociator (# F f₁) (# F g) fz)
     • (# F f₁ ◃ βg))
    • lassociator (# F f₁) fy (# G g)) • (αf₁ ▹ # G g))
  • rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g))
 • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)) • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(## F (α ▹ g) ▹ fz)
• (((psfunctor_comp F f₂ g) ^-1 ▹ fz)
   • (rassociator (# F f₂) (# F g) fz
      • ((# F f₂ ◃ βg)
         • (lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)
            • ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
               • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
                  • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g))))))) =
((psfunctor_comp F f₁ g) ^-1 ▹ fz)
• (rassociator (# F f₁) (# F g) fz
   • ((# F f₁ ◃ βg)
      • (lassociator (# F f₁) fy (# G g)
         • ((αf₁ ▹ # G g)
            • (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
               • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)
                  • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fz
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_comp F f₁ g)))
^-1
• ((## F (α ▹ g) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f₂ g) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f₂) (# F g) fz
         • ((# F f₂ ◃ βg)
            • (lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)
               • ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
                  • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
                     • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)))))))) =
rassociator (# F f₁) (# F g) fz
• ((# F f₁ ◃ βg)
   • (lassociator (# F f₁) fy (# G g)
      • ((αf₁ ▹ # G g)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(psfunctor_comp F f₁ g ▹ fz)
• ((## F (α ▹ g) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f₂ g) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f₂) (# F g) fz
         • ((# F f₂ ◃ βg)
            • (lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)
               • ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
                  • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
                     • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)))))))) =
rassociator (# F f₁) (# F g) fz
• ((# F f₁ ◃ βg)
   • (lassociator (# F f₁) fy (# G g)
      • ((αf₁ ▹ # G g)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(psfunctor_comp F f₁ g ▹ fz)
• ((## F (α ▹ g) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f₂ g) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f₂) (# F g) fz
         • ((# F f₂ ◃ βg)
            • (lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)
               • ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
                  • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
                     • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
?b =
rassociator (# F f₁) (# F g) fz
• ((# F f₁ ◃ βg)
   • (lassociator (# F f₁) fy (# G g)
      • ((αf₁ ▹ # G g)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(psfunctor_comp F f₁ g ▹ fz)
• ((## F (α ▹ g) ▹ fz)
   • (((psfunctor_comp F f₂ g) ^-1 ▹ fz)
      • (rassociator (# F f₂) (# F g) fz
         • ((# F f₂ ◃ βg)
            • (lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)
               • ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
                  • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
                     • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((((((((psfunctor_comp F f₁ g ▹ fz)
       • (## F (α ▹ g) ▹ fz))
      • ((psfunctor_comp F f₂ g) ^-1 ▹ fz))
     • rassociator (# F f₂) (# F g) fz)
    • (# F f₂ ◃ βg)) • lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g))
  • (αf₂ ▹ # G g)) • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((psfunctor_comp F f₁ g ▹ fz) • (## F (α ▹ g) ▹ fz))
• ((psfunctor_comp F f₂ g) ^-1 ▹ fz) = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((psfunctor_comp F f₁ g • ## F (α ▹ g))
 • (psfunctor_comp F f₂ g) ^-1) ▹ fz = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(((## F α ▹ # F g) • psfunctor_comp F f₂ g)
 • (psfunctor_comp F f₂ g) ^-1) ▹ fz = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((## F α ▹ # F g)
 • (psfunctor_comp F f₂ g
    • (psfunctor_comp F f₂ g) ^-1)) ▹ fz = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((## F α ▹ # F g) • id₂ (# F f₂ · # F g)) ▹ fz = ?y'

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(## F α ▹ # F g) ▹ fz = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(((((((## F α ▹ # F g) ▹ fz)
     • rassociator (# F f₂) (# F g) fz)
    • (# F f₂ ◃ βg)) • lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g))
  • (αf₂ ▹ # G g)) • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g) =
rassociator (# F f₁) (# F g) fz
• ((# F f₁ ◃ βg)
   • (lassociator (# F f₁) fy (# G g)
      • ((αf₁ ▹ # G g)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(((((((## F α ▹ # F g) ▹ fz)
     • rassociator (# F f₂) (# F g) fz)
    • (# F f₂ ◃ βg)) • lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g))
  • (αf₂ ▹ # G g)) • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g) = ?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
?b =
rassociator (# F f₁) (# F g) fz
• ((# F f₁ ◃ βg)
   • (lassociator (# F f₁) fy (# G g)
      • ((αf₁ ▹ # G g)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(((((((## F α ▹ # F g) ▹ fz)
     • rassociator (# F f₂) (# F g) fz)
    • (# F f₂ ◃ βg)) • lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g))
  • (αf₂ ▹ # G g)) • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(((((rassociator (# F f₁) (# F g) fz
     • (## F α ▹ # F g · fz)) • (# F f₂ ◃ βg))
   • lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)) • (αf₂ ▹ # G g))
 • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
rassociator (# F f₁) (# F g) fz
• ((## F α ▹ # F g · fz)
   • ((# F f₂ ◃ βg)
      • (lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)
         • ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
            • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
               • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(## F α ▹ # F g · fz)
• ((# F f₂ ◃ βg)
   • (lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)
      • ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
            • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g))))) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(((((## F α ▹ # F g · fz) • (# F f₂ ◃ βg))
   • lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)) • (αf₂ ▹ # G g))
 • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(((((# F f₁ ◃ βg) • (## F α ▹ fy · # G g))
   • lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)) • (αf₂ ▹ # G g))
 • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(# F f₁ ◃ βg)
• ((## F α ▹ fy · # G g)
   • (lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)
      • ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
            • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g))))) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(## F α ▹ fy · # G g)
• (lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)
   • ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
      • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
         • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)))) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((((## F α ▹ fy · # G g)
   • lassociator (# F f₂) fy (# G g)) • (αf₂ ▹ # G g))
 • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(((lassociator (# F f₁) fy (# G g)
   • ((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g)) • (αf₂ ▹ # G g))
 • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
lassociator (# F f₁) fy (# G g)
• (((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g)
   • ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
      • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
         • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
rassociator (# F f₁) (# F g) fz
• ((# F f₁ ◃ βg)
   • (lassociator (# F f₁) fy (# G g)
      • (((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g)
         • ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
            • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
               • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)))))) =
rassociator (# F f₁) (# F g) fz
• ((# F f₁ ◃ βg)
   • (lassociator (# F f₁) fy (# G g)
      • ((αf₁ ▹ # G g)
         • (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
            • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)
               • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g)
• ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
   • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g))) =
(αf₁ ▹ # G g)
• (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
   • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)
      • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(αf₁ ▹ # G g)
• (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
   • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)
      • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g)))) =
((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g)
• ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
   • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(αf₁ ▹ # G g)
• (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
   • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)
      • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g)))) = ?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
?b =
((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g)
• ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
   • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(αf₁ ▹ # G g)
• (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
   • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₁ g)
      • (fx ◃ ## G (α ▹ g)))) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(αf₁ ▹ # G g)
• (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
   • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_comp G f₁ g • ## G (α ▹ g)))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧

αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(αf₁ ▹ # G g)
• (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
   • (fx ◃ ((## G α ▹ # G g) • psfunctor_comp G f₂ g))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(αf₁ ▹ # G g)
• (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
   • ((fx ◃ (## G α ▹ # G g))
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g))) = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(αf₁ ▹ # G g)
• (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
   • ((fx ◃ (## G α ▹ # G g))
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g))) =
((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g)
• ((αf₂ ▹ # G g)
   • (rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(((αf₁ ▹ # G g) • rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g))
 • (fx ◃ (## G α ▹ # G g)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g) =
((((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g) • (αf₂ ▹ # G g))
 • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G f₂ g)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((αf₁ ▹ # G g) • rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g))
• (fx ◃ (## G α ▹ # G g)) =
(((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g) • (αf₂ ▹ # G g))
• rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)

F, G: psfunctor B C

αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(αf₁ ▹ # G g)
• (rassociator fx (# G f₁) (# G g)
   • (fx ◃ (## G α ▹ # G g))) =
((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g)
• ((αf₂ ▹ # G g) • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(αf₁ ▹ # G g)
• (((fx ◃ ## G α) ▹ # G g)
   • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)) =
((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g)
• ((αf₂ ▹ # G g) • rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((αf₁ ▹ # G g) • ((fx ◃ ## G α) ▹ # G g))
• rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g) =
(((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g) • (αf₂ ▹ # G g))
• rassociator fx (# G f₂) (# G g)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(αf₁ ▹ # G g) • ((fx ◃ ## G α) ▹ # G g) =
((## F α ▹ fy) ▹ # G g) • (αf₂ ▹ # G g)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)) ▹ # G g =
((## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂) ▹ # G g

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: f₁ ==> f₂
fx: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
fy: C ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
fz: C ⟦ F z, G z ⟧
αf₁: # F f₁ · fy ==> fx · # G f₁
αf₂: # F f₂ · fy ==> fx · # G f₂
βg: # F g · fz ==> fy · # G g
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂ = αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α)
αf₁ • (fx ◃ ## G α) = (## F α ▹ fy) • αf₂

      exact (!hα).
  Qed.

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_prebicat_laws
  (disp_inserter_prebicat_1,, disp_inserter_ops)

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_prebicat_laws
  (disp_inserter_prebicat_1,, disp_inserter_ops)

    repeat split ; intro ; intros ; apply C.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_inserter_prebicat : disp_prebicat B
    := (_ ,, disp_inserter_ops_laws).

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_bicat B

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_bicat B

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
has_disp_cellset disp_inserter_prebicat

    abstract
      (intros X Y f g α hX hY hf hg hα hβ ;
       apply isasetaprop ;
       cbn in * ; unfold disp_inserter_disp_cat_2cell in * ;
       apply C).
  Defined.

  (** Some properties of the displayed inserter *)
  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_inserter_bicat

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_inserter_bicat

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: disp_inserter_bicat a
bb: disp_inserter_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (ff ==>[ x] gg)

    apply C.
  Qed.

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_locally_sym disp_inserter_bicat

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_locally_sym disp_inserter_bicat

    
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(## F α ^-1 ▹ fy) • αf = βg • (fx ◃ ## G α ^-1)

    
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
is_invertible_2cell (fx ◃ ## G α ^-1)
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((## F α ^-1 ▹ fy) • αf) • ?Hε ^-1 = βg

    
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
is_invertible_2cell (fx ◃ ## G α ^-1)

      
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
is_invertible_2cell (## G α ^-1)

      
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
is_invertible_2cell α ^-1

      is_iso.
    
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((## F α ^-1 ▹ fy) • αf)
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker fx
     (psfunctor_is_iso G
        (α ^-1,, is_invertible_2cell_inv α))) ^-1 = βg

    
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
((## F α ^-1 ▹ fy) • αf) • (fx ◃ ## G α) = βg

    
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
(## F α ^-1 ▹ fy) • (αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)) = βg

    
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
is_invertible_2cell (## F α ^-1 ▹ fy)
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
αf • (fx ◃ ## G α) = ?Hε ^-1 • βg

F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)

βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
is_invertible_2cell (## F α ^-1 ▹ fy)

      
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
is_invertible_2cell (## F α ^-1)

      
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
is_invertible_2cell α ^-1

      is_iso.
    
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
αf • (fx ◃ ## G α) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fy
   (psfunctor_is_iso F
      (α ^-1,, is_invertible_2cell_inv α))) ^-1 • βg

    
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
αf • (fx ◃ ## G α) = (## F α ▹ fy) • βg

    
B, C: ∑ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C
F, G: psfunctor_bicat B C
x, y: pr1 B
f, g: pr2 B x y
α: ∑ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η
fx: pr2 C (F x) (G x)
fy: pr2 C (F y) (G y)
αf: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F f · fy) (fx · # G f)
βg: pr2 C (F x) (G y) (# F g · fy) (fx · # G g)
hα: (## F α ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)
αf • (fx ◃ ## G α) = αf • (fx ◃ ## G α)

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

 exact disp_inserter_locally_propositional.

  (** Local univalence *)
  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_inserter_bicat

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_inserter_bicat

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
fiberwise_local_univalent disp_inserter_bicat

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_inserter_bicat (idpath f) αf
     βg)

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) αf
  βg
→ transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, fx -->[ z] fy)
    (idpath f) αf = βg
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
isaprop
  (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, fx -->[ z] fy)
     (idpath f) αf = βg)
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
isaprop
  (disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
     αf βg)

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) αf
  βg
→ transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, fx -->[ z] fy)
    (idpath f) αf = βg
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) αf βg
→ αf = βg

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) αf
  βg
αf = βg

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) αf
  βg
h:= pr1 p: αf ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] βg
αf = βg

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) αf
  βg
h:= pr1 p: disp_inserter_disp_cat_2cell x y f f (id₂ f) fx fy
  αf βg
αf = βg

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) αf
  βg
h:= pr1 p: (## F (id₂ f) ▹ fy) • βg =
αf • (fx ◃ ## G (id₂ f))
αf = βg

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) αf
  βg
h: (id₂ (# F f) ▹ fy) • βg = αf • (fx ◃ id₂ (# G f))
αf = βg

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) αf
  βg
h: id₂ (# F f · fy) • βg = αf • id₂ (fx · # G f)
αf = βg

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) αf
  βg
h: βg = αf
αf = βg

      exact (!h).
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
isaprop
  (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ x, y ⟧, fx -->[ z] fy)
     (idpath f) αf = βg)
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
isaprop (αf = βg)

      apply C.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
isaprop
  (disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
     αf βg)
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)))
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
∏ x0 y0 : αf ==>[ idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)] βg,
is_disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
  x0
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell
    (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) y0 → x0 = y0

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)))
 exact isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
∏ x0 y0 : αf ==>[ idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)] βg,
is_disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
  x0
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell
    (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) y0 → x0 = y0
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
fy: disp_inserter_bicat y
αf, βg: fx -->[ f] fy
x0, y0: αf ==>[ idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)] βg
X: is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) x0
X0: is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) y0
x0 = y0

        apply disp_inserter_locally_propositional.
  Qed.

  (** Global univalence *)
  Section DispAdjEquivToInv2Cell.
    Context {x : B}
            {fx fy : disp_inserter_bicat x}
            (α : disp_adjoint_equivalence
                   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
                   fx fy).

    Definition disp_adjequiv_to_inv2cell_cell
      : fx ==> fy
      := linvunitor _
         • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx)
         • pr112 α
         • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G _)^-1)
         • runitor _.

    Definition disp_adjequiv_to_inv2cell_inv
      : fy ==> fx
      := linvunitor _
         • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
         • pr1 α
         • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G _)^-1)
         • runitor _.

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
disp_adjequiv_to_inv2cell_cell
• disp_adjequiv_to_inv2cell_inv = id₂ fx

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
disp_adjequiv_to_inv2cell_cell
• disp_adjequiv_to_inv2cell_inv = id₂ fx

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
((((linvunitor fx • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx)) • pr112 α)
  • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) • runitor fy)
• ((((linvunitor fy • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)) • pr1 α)
    • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) • runitor fx) =
id₂ fx

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
linvunitor fx
• ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx)
   • (pr112 α
      • ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
         • (runitor fy
            • (linvunitor fy
               • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
                  • (pr1 α
                     • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
                        • runitor fx)))))))) = id₂ fx

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
(psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx)
• (pr112 α
   • ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
      • (runitor fy
         • (linvunitor fy
            • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
               • (pr1 α
                  • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
                     • runitor fx))))))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor fx) ^-1 • id₂ fx

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
is_invertible_2cell (psfunctor_id F x)
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
            • (pr1 α
               • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
                  • runitor fx)))))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fx ?Goal0) ^-1
• ((is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor fx) ^-1 • id₂ fx)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
is_invertible_2cell (psfunctor_id F x)

        apply psfunctor_id.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
            • (pr1 α
               • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
                  • runitor fx)))))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fx
   (let X :=
      λ (F : psfunctor B C) (a : B),
      pr2 (psfunctor_id F a) in
    X F x)) ^-1
• ((is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor fx) ^-1 • id₂ fx)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
            • (pr1 α
               • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
                  • runitor fx)))))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx • id₂ fx)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
((((((pr112 α • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1))
     • runitor fy) • linvunitor fy)
   • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)) • pr1 α)
 • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) • runitor fx =
(((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
• id₂ fx

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
(((((pr112 α • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1))
    • runitor fy) • linvunitor fy)
  • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)) • pr1 α)
• (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1) =
((((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
 • id₂ fx) • (is_invertible_2cell_runitor fx) ^-1

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
((((pr112 α • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1))
   • runitor fy) • linvunitor fy)
 • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)) • pr1 α =
(((((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • id₂ fx) • (is_invertible_2cell_runitor fx) ^-1)
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker fx
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_id G x))) ^-1

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
((((pr112 α • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1))
   • runitor fy) • linvunitor fy)
 • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)) • pr1 α =
(((((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • id₂ fx) • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (id₂ fx
      • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
