B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr121 (pr2 α): id_disp fx ==>[
left_adjoint_unit
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] pr1 α ;; pr112 α
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr121 (pr2 α): disp_inserter_disp_cat_2cell x x (id₁ x)
  (id₁ x · id₁ x) (linvunitor (id₁ x)) fx fx
  (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
    • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
  ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1
         ▹ fx)
        • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x))
            fx) • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr112 α))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
     • (pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
    • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr121 (pr2 α): (## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1
         ▹ fx)
        • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x))
            fx) • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr112 α))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
     • (pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
    • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))) =
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
• (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p: (((((((## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1
         ▹ fx))
     • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx)
    • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr112 α))
   • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
  • (pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) =
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
• (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p: (((((((((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
         • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x)))
        • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1
         ▹ fx))
     • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx)
    • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr112 α))
   • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
  • (pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) =
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
• (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p: (((((((((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
         • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x)))
        • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1)
      ▹ fx)
     • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx)
    • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr112 α))
   • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
  • (pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) =
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
• (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p: ((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))
     • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
        • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1)))
 ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr112 α)
      • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
           (# G (id₁ x))
         • ((pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
            • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x))
                 (# G (id₁ x))
               • (fx
                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x)
                      (id₁ x))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x))))))
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p: ((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))
     • id₂ (# F (id₁ x) · # F (id₁ x)))) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr112 α)
      • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
           (# G (id₁ x))
         • ((pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
            • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x))
                 (# G (id₁ x))
               • (fx
                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x)
                      (id₁ x))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x))))))
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p: ((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr112 α)
      • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
           (# G (id₁ x))
         • ((pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
            • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x))
                 (# G (id₁ x))
               • (fx
                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x)
                      (id₁ x))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x))))))
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p: ((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr112 α)
      • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
           (# G (id₁ x))
         • ((pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
            • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x))
                 (# G (id₁ x))
               • (fx
                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x)
                      (id₁ x))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx
            ◃ ((linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
                • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
               • psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))))))
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p: ((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr112 α)
      • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
           (# G (id₁ x))
         • ((pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
            • (rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x))
                 (# G (id₁ x))
               • (fx
                  ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x)
                      (id₁ x))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • ((fx
             ◃ (linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
                • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x))))
            • (fx
               ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))))))
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

  (((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))

            • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x))))))
pr112 α
• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p': linvunitor (# F (id₁ x) · fx)
• (((((id₁ (F x) ◃ pr112 α)
      • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy · # G (id₁ x)))
     • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
    • (pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
   • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• ((lunitor fx • rinvunitor fx)
   • (fx
      ◃ (psfunctor_id G x
         • (linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
            • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x))))))

• ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fy
      • (linvunitor fy
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) • pr1 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

                  • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
(fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
• (runitor fy
   • (linvunitor fy
      • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
         • (pr1 α
            • (fx
               ◃ (linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
                  • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x)))))))) =
linvunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))
• (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fy (# G (id₁ x))
   • (((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x))
      • ((pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
(fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
• (runitor fy
   • (linvunitor fy
      • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
         • (pr1 α
            • (fx
               ◃ (linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
                  • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x)))))))) =
?b

   • (((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x))
      • ((pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))))

(((runitor fy • linvunitor fy)
  • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)) • pr1 α)

F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
(linvunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x))

   • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
      • (pr1 α
         • (fx
            ◃ (linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
               • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x))))))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.

• (rassociator (id₁ (F x)) fy (id₁ (G x))
   • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy · id₁ (G x))
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ runitor fy)
         • (pr1 α
            • (fx
               ◃ (linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
                  • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x)))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
?b =
((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x))
• ((pr1 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
   • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))

         • (pr1 α

                  • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x)))))))) =

fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
(# G (id₁ x) ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
• (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
   • (## G (runitor (id₁ x))
      • (linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
         • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x))))) =
# G (id₁ x) ◃ psfunctor_id G x

x: B

   • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x))) =

   λ (F : psfunctor B C) (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧), pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f g) in
 X G x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1
• id₂ (# G (id₁ x) · # G (id₁ x))

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
((((linvunitor fy • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)) • pr1 α)
  • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) • runitor fx)
• ((((linvunitor fx • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx))
     • pr112 α) • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1))
   • runitor fy) = id₂ fy

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr221 (pr2 α): (λ _ : id_disp fx ==>[
       left_adjoint_unit
         (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] 
       pr1 α ;; pr112 α,
 pr112 α ;; pr1 α ==>[
 left_adjoint_counit
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] id_disp
                                                fy)
  (pr121 (pr2 α))
((((linvunitor fy • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)) • pr1 α)
  • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) • runitor fx)
• ((((linvunitor fx • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx))
     • pr112 α) • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1))
   • runitor fy) = id₂ fy

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr221 (pr2 α): disp_inserter_disp_cat_2cell x x (id₁ x · id₁ x)
  (id₁ x) (lunitor (id₁ x)) fy fy
  ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1
         ▹ fy)
        • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x))
            fy) • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
     • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
    • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
  (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
((((linvunitor fy • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)) • pr1 α)
  • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) • runitor fx)
• ((((linvunitor fx • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx))
     • pr112 α) • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1))
   • runitor fy) = id₂ fy

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr221 (pr2 α): (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))
((((linvunitor fy • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)) • pr1 α)
  • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) • runitor fx)
• ((((linvunitor fx • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx))
     • pr112 α) • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1))
   • runitor fy) = id₂ fy

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr221 (pr2 α): (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))
((((((((linvunitor fy • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy))
       • pr1 α) • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1))
     • runitor fx) • linvunitor fx)
   • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx)) • pr112 α)
 • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) • runitor fy =
id₂ fy

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr221 (pr2 α): (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))
(((((((linvunitor fy • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy))
      • pr1 α) • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1))
    • runitor fx) • linvunitor fx)
  • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx)) • pr112 α)
• (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1) =
id₂ fy • (is_invertible_2cell_runitor fy) ^-1

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr221 (pr2 α): (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))
((((((linvunitor fy • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)) • pr1 α)
    • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) • runitor fx)
  • linvunitor fx) • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx))
• pr112 α =
(id₂ fy • (is_invertible_2cell_runitor fy) ^-1)
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker fy
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_id G x))) ^-1

  • linvunitor fx) • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx))
• pr112 α =
(id₂ fy • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)

  • linvunitor fx) • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx))

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x

p:= pr221 (pr2 α): (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)

    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))

 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))
linvunitor fy
• ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
   • (pr1 α
      • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
         • (runitor fx
            • (linvunitor fx
               • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx) • pr112 α)))))) =
rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)

     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))

   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))

 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))

(psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
• (pr1 α
   • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
      • (runitor fx
         • (linvunitor fx
            • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx) • pr112 α))))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor fy) ^-1
• (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))

 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))
is_invertible_2cell (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr221 (pr2 α): (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))
pr1 α
• ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fx
      • (linvunitor fx
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx) • pr112 α)))) =
?Hε ^-1
• ((is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor fy) ^-1
   • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))
is_invertible_2cell (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)

x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr221 (pr2 α): (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))

        apply psfunctor_id.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p:= pr221 (pr2 α): (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))
pr1 α
• ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fx
      • (linvunitor fx
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx) • pr112 α)))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fy
   (let X :=
      λ (F : psfunctor B C) (a : B),
      pr2 (psfunctor_id F a) in
    X F x)) ^-1
• ((is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor fy) ^-1
   • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

p:= pr221 (pr2 α): (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))
pr1 α
• ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
   • (runitor fx
      • (linvunitor fx
         • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx) • pr112 α)))) =
((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
• (lunitor fy
   • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence

((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))
(## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (pr1 α
   • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
      • (runitor fx
         • (linvunitor fx
            • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx) • pr112 α))))) =

   • (lunitor fy

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
p: (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (lunitor fy
      • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))) =
((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α)
      • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx
           (# G (id₁ x))
         • ((pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
            • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x))
                 (# G (id₁ x))
               • ((fy
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x)
                       (id₁ x))
                  • (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))))))))
(## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (pr1 α
   • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
      • (runitor fx
         • (linvunitor fx
            • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx) • pr112 α))))) =
(## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((pr2 (psfunctor_id F x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (lunitor fy
      • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))

(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)

   • (pr1 α

                         (id₁ x)) ^-1

                         ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
                     • lunitor (# G (id₁ x)))))))))

F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)

   • (pr1 α
      • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)

rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α)
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • ((pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy
               ◃ (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)

                         (id₁ x)) ^-1

                         ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
                     • lunitor (# G (id₁ x)))))))))

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α)
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • ((pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy
               ◃ (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
                  • (((psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x)
                         (id₁ x)) ^-1
                      • ((psfunctor_id G x) ^-1
                         ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
                     • lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))))))) =
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• ((lunitor (# F (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
   • (pr1 α
      • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
         • (runitor fx
            • (linvunitor fx
               • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx) • pr112 α))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ pr1 α)
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • ((pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy
               ◃ (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
                  • (((psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x)
                         (id₁ x)) ^-1
                      • ((psfunctor_id G x) ^-1
                         ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
                     • lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))))))) =
?b

      • (((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1) ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (runitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx · # G (id₁ x))
• (lunitor (fx · # G (id₁ x))
   • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
      • (runitor fx
         • (linvunitor fx
            • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx) • pr112 α))))) =
lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
• ((pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
   • (((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1) ▹ # G (id₁ x))
      • (runitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x))))

    • (lunitor fx ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
   • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
      • (runitor fx
         • (linvunitor fx
            • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx) • pr112 α))))) =
lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
• ((pr112 α ▹ # G (id₁ x))
   • (((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1) ▹ # G (id₁ x))
      • (runitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x))))

(fy · # G (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
• runitor (fy · # G (id₁ x)) =
((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1) • runitor fy)
▹ # G (id₁ x)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
(fy · # G (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
• runitor (fy · # G (id₁ x)) =
((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1) ▹ # G (id₁ x))
• (runitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x))

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy

• runitor (fy · # G (id₁ x)) =
((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1) ▹ # G (id₁ x))
• (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
   • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))

   • (fy ◃ runitor (# G (id₁ x)))) =

 • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (id₁ (G x)))

 • rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x)))

B, C: bicat

x: B

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (id₁ (G x))
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_id G x))) ^-1

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy

lunitor (id₁ (G x)) • psfunctor_id G x

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy

lunitor (id₁ (G x)) • psfunctor_id G x

      apply idpath.

 exact disp_adjequiv_to_inv2cell_inv_cell.
    Defined.
  End DispAdjEquivToInv2Cell.


  Section Inv2CellToDispAdjEquiv.
    Context {x : B}
            {fx fy : disp_inserter_bicat x}
            (α : invertible_2cell fx fy).

    Definition inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj
      : fx -->[ internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] fy
      := ((psfunctor_id F x)^-1 ▹ fy)
           • lunitor _
           • α^-1
           • rinvunitor _
           • (_ ◃ psfunctor_id G x).

    Definition inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj
      : fy -->[ left_adjoint_right_adjoint (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] fx
      := ((psfunctor_id F x)^-1 ▹ fx)
           • lunitor _
           • α
           • rinvunitor _
           • (_ ◃ psfunctor_id G x).

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
id_disp fx ==>[
left_adjoint_unit
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj ;; inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
id_disp fx ==>[
left_adjoint_unit
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj ;; inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
        • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx)
       • (# F (id₁ x)
          ◃ inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
     • (inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj
        ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
    • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))) =
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
• (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
        • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx)
       • (# F (id₁ x)
          ◃ inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
     • (inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj
        ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
    • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))) =
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
• (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
        • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx)
       • (# F (id₁ x)
          ◃ ((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
                • lunitor fx) • α) • rinvunitor fy)
             • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
     • (((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
           • α ^-1) • rinvunitor fx)
         • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
    • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))) =
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
• (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
        • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx)
       • (# F (id₁ x)
          ◃ ((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
                • lunitor fx) • α) • rinvunitor fy)
             • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
     • (((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
            ▹ # G (id₁ x))
           • (lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
          • (α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
         • (rinvunitor fx ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
        • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G (id₁ x))))
    • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))) =
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
• (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
• ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
        • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx)
       • (((((# F (id₁ x)
              ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx))
             • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx))
            • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ α))
           • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy))
          • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
     • (((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
            ▹ # G (id₁ x))
           • (lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
          • (α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
         • (rinvunitor fx ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
        • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G (id₁ x))))
    • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))) =
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
• (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx))
         • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
            • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)
               • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
                  • ((# F (id₁ x)
                      ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
                     • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
                          (# G (id₁ x))
                        • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                             ▹ fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                           • ((lunitor fy
                               ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                              • ((α ^-1 ▹ # G ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx))
         • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
            • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)
               • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
                  • ((# F (id₁ x)
                      ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
                     • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
                          (# G (id₁ x))
                        • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                             ▹ fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                           • ((lunitor fy
                               ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                              • ((α ^-1 ▹ # G ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
?b =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx))
         • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
            • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)
               • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
                  • ((# F (id₁ x)
                      ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
                     • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
                          (# G (id₁ x))
                        • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                             ▹ fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                           • ((lunitor fy
                               ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                              • ((α ^-1 ▹ # G ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fx
• ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx))
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)
         • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
            • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
               • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
                    (# G (id₁ x))
                  • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                      ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                     • ((lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                        • ((α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                           • ((rinvunitor fx
                               ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                              • (((...) ▹ # G ...)
                                 • (rassociator fx ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((((((((((((rassociator ... ... fx • (...))
           • (# F ... ◃ lunitor fx))
          • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ α))
         • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy))
        • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))
       • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
      • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
     • (lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
    • (α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
   • (rinvunitor fx ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(((((((((((((...) • rassociator ... ... fx)
           • (# F ... ◃ lunitor fx))
          • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ α))
         • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy))
        • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))
       • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
      • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
     • (lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
    • (α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
   • (rinvunitor fx ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
   • ((((((((((((...) • (...))
               • (# F ... ◃ rinvunitor fy))
              • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))
             • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
                 (# G (id₁ x)))
            • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
               ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
           • (lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
          • (α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
         • (rinvunitor fx ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
        • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
       • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fx)
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fx)
   • ((((((((((((...) • (...))
               • (# F ... ◃ rinvunitor fy))
              • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))
             • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
                 (# G (id₁ x)))
            • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
               ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
           • (lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
          • (α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
         • (rinvunitor fx ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
        • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
       • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
      • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))) = 
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
?b =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x))))))

     • (lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
    • (α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
   • (rinvunitor fx ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • rassociator fx (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx

                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x))))))

                           • ((rinvunitor fx

                                   (id₁ ...) (# G ...)

((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx ◃ ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1))) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)
         • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
            • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
               • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy

                              • (rassociator fx
                                   (id₁ ...) (# G ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)

            ◃ ((linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
                • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
               • psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))))))

                               ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                              • (rassociator fx
                                   (id₁ ...) (# G ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (((fx ◃ linvunitor (# G (id₁ x)))
             • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x))))
            • (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(((((((((((((...) • rassociator ... ... fx)
           • (# F ... ◃ lunitor fx))
          • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ α))
         • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy))
        • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))
       • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
      • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
     • (lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
    • (α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
   • (rinvunitor fx ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x))))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) =
(((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
    • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
  • (fx ◃ linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))))
 • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x))))
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) ▹ fx)
          • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx)
         • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx))
        • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ α))
       • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy))
      • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))
     • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (# G (id₁ x)))
    • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
   • (lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • (α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • (rinvunitor fx ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
• rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x)) =
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
• (fx ◃ linvunitor (# G (id₁ x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1))) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)
         • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
            • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
               • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
                    (# G (id₁ x))
                  • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                      ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                     • ((lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                        • ((α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                           • ((rinvunitor fx
                               ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                              • rassociator fx
                                  (id₁ (G x))
                                  (# G (id₁ x)))))))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx ◃ linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))))))

F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1))) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)
         • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
            • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
               • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
                    (# G (id₁ x))
                  • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                      ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                     • ((lunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                        • ((α ^-1 ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                           • ((rinvunitor fx
                               ▹ # G (id₁ x))
                              • rassociator fx
                                  (id₁ (G x))
                                  (# G (id₁ x)))))))))))) =
?b

x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1))) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)
         • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
            • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
                 (id₁ (G x))
               • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ id₁ (G x))
                  • ((lunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x))
                     • ((α ^-1 ▹ id₁ (G x))
                        • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x))
                           • (rassociator fx
                                (id₁ (G x))
                                (id₁ (G x))
                              • (fx
                                 ◃ (id₁ ...
                                    ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
         • (fx ◃ linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))))))

((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))

F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x)))
• (fx ◃ (id₁ (G x) ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx
      • ((fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x)))
         • (fx ◃ (id₁ (G x) ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))) =
((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1))) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)
         • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
            • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
                 (id₁ (G x))
               • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ id₁ (G x))
                  • ((lunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x))
                     • ((α ^-1 ▹ id₁ (G x))
                        • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x))
                           • (rassociator fx
                                (id₁ (G x))
                                (id₁ (G x))
                              • (fx
                                 ◃ (id₁ ...
                                    ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x))))
• (fx ◃ (id₁ (G x) ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) ▹ fx)
          • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx)
         • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx))
        • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ α))
       • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy))
      • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (id₁ (G x)))
     • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ id₁ (G x)))
    • (lunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x))) • (α ^-1 ▹ id₁ (G x)))
  • (rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x)))
 • rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (id₁ (G x)))
• (fx ◃ (id₁ (G x) ◃ psfunctor_id G x))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
 • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x))) =
((((((((((((linvunitor ... • (...))
           • (# F ... ◃ ... ^-1)) ▹ fx)
         • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx)
        • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx))
       • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ α))
      • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy))
     • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (id₁ (G x)))
    • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ id₁ (G x)))
   • (lunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x))) • (α ^-1 ▹ id₁ (G x)))
 • (rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x)))
• rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (id₁ (G x))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x))))) =
((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1))) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)
         • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
            • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy
                 (id₁ (G x))
               • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                   ▹ id₁ (G x))
                  • ((lunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x))
                     • ((α ^-1 ▹ id₁ (G x))
                        • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x))
                           • rassociator fx
                               (id₁ (G x)) (id₁ (G x)))))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x))))) =
((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
     • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ id₁ (F x)))) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)

                        • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x))
                           • rassociator fx
                               (id₁ (G x)) (id₁ (G x)))))))))))

   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)

((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x)))))

α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((((((((((((... ^-1 • linvunitor ...)

         • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx)
        • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx))
       • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ α))
      • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy))
     • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (id₁ (G x)))
    • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ id₁ (G x)))
   • (lunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x))) • (α ^-1 ▹ id₁ (G x)))
 • (rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x)))
• rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (id₁ (G x)) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x)))))

        • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx))
       • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ α))
      • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy))
     • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (id₁ (G x)))
    • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) ▹ id₁ (G x)))
   • (lunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x))) • (α ^-1 ▹ id₁ (G x)))
 • (rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x)))
• rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (id₁ (G x)) =

   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x)))))

         • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)

                       (id₁ (G x))

                              • ((rinvunitor fx
                                  ▹ id₁ ...)

                                     (id₁ ...)
                                     (id₁ ...)))))))))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x)))))

F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B

rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx
• ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ lunitor fx)
   • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ α)
      • ((# F (id₁ x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
         • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fy (id₁ (G x))
            • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
                ▹ id₁ (G x))
               • ((lunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x))
                  • ((α ^-1 ▹ id₁ (G x))
                     • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x))
                        • rassociator fx (id₁ (G x))
                            (id₁ (G x)))))))))) = 
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
?b = ?t20

                            (id₁ (G x)))))))))) =

F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(linvunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fx)
• ((((((((rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx
          • (id₁ (F x) ◃ lunitor fx))
         • (id₁ (F x) ◃ α))
        • (id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fy))
       • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fy (id₁ (G x)))
      • (lunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x)))
     • (α ^-1 ▹ id₁ (G x)))
    • (rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x)))
   • rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (id₁ (G x))) =
lunitor fx
• (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x))))

      
B, C: bicat

x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(linvunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fx)
• (rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ lunitor fx)
      • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ α)
         • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
            • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fy (id₁ (G x))
               • ((lunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x))
                  • ((α ^-1 ▹ id₁ (G x))
                     • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x))
                        • rassociator fx (id₁ (G x))
                            (id₁ (G x)))))))))) =
lunitor fx
• (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x))))

            • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fy (id₁ (G x))
               • ((lunitor fy ▹ id₁ (G x))
                  • ((α ^-1 ▹ id₁ (G x))
                     • ((rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x))
                        • rassociator fx (id₁ (G x))
                            (id₁ (G x)))))))))) = 
?b

fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(((((rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x)) fx
     • (id₁ (F x) ◃ lunitor fx))
    • (id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fx))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (id₁ (G x)))
  • (lunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x)))
 • (rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x)))
• rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (id₁ (G x)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(((((runitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fx)
    • (id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fx))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (id₁ (G x)))
  • (lunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x)))
 • (rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x)))
• rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (id₁ (G x)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(linvunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fx)
• ((((((runitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fx)
       • (id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fx))
      • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (id₁ (G x)))
     • (lunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x)))
    • (rinvunitor fx ▹ id₁ (G x)))
   • rassociator fx (id₁ (G x)) (id₁ (G x))) =
lunitor fx
• (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (G x))))

x: B

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj ;; inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj ==>[
left_adjoint_counit
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] id_disp
                                               fy

                                               fy

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x)
        ◃ inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj
      ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x)
        ◃ ((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
              • lunitor fy) • α ^-1) • rinvunitor fx)
           • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
         • α) • rinvunitor fy)
       • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
    • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) =
((((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x)
        ◃ ((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
              • lunitor fy) • α ^-1) • rinvunitor fx)
           • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
         • α) • rinvunitor fy)
       • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
• (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
   • (lunitor fy
      • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))) =
((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 ▹ fy)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy
   • ((# F (id₁ x)
       ◃ (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
          • (lunitor fy
             • (α ^-1
                • (rinvunitor fx
                   • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))
      • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
         • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
              • (lunitor fx
                 • (α
                    • (rinvunitor fy
                       • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
             ▹ # G (id₁ x))
            • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x))
                 (# G (id₁ x))
               • ((fy
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
                  • (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fy
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv
      (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))) ^-1
• ((## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
   • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • (lunitor fy
         • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))) =
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
       • (lunitor fy
          • (α ^-1
             • (rinvunitor fx
                • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx
              • (α
                 • (rinvunitor fy
                    • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • ((fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
               • (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) ▹ fy)
• ((## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
   • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • (lunitor fy
         • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))) =
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
       • (lunitor fy
          • (α ^-1
             • (rinvunitor fx
                • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx
              • (α
                 • (rinvunitor fy
                    • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • ((fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
               • (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x))))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
       • (lunitor fy
          • (α ^-1
             • (rinvunitor fx
                • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx
              • (α
                 • (rinvunitor fy
                    • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • ((fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
               • (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))))))) =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) ▹ fy)
• ((## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
   • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • (lunitor fy
         • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
       • (lunitor fy
          • (α ^-1
             • (rinvunitor fx
                • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx
              • (α
                 • (rinvunitor fy
                    • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • ((fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
               • (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))))))) =
?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
?b =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) ▹ fy)
• ((## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
   • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • (lunitor fy
         • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))

       • (lunitor fy
          • (α ^-1
             • (rinvunitor fx
                • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx
              • (α
                 • (rinvunitor fy

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧

(# F (id₁ x)
 ◃ (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
    • (lunitor fy
       • (α ^-1
          • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))
• (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
   • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
        • (lunitor fx
           • (α
              • (rinvunitor fy
                 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
       ▹ # G (id₁ x))
      • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))
         • ((fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
            • (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x))))))) = 
?t2

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy
• (((# F (id₁ x) ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy))
    • (# F (id₁ x)
       ◃ (lunitor fy
          • (α ^-1
             • (rinvunitor fx
                • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx
              • (α
                 • (rinvunitor fy
                    • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))

               • (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))))))) =

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((((((rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x)) fy
      • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)))
     • (# F (id₁ x)
        ◃ (((lunitor fy • α ^-1) • rinvunitor fx)
           • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
         • α) • rinvunitor fy)
       • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x))) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((((((((# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1) ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x)
        ◃ (((lunitor fy • α ^-1) • rinvunitor fx)
           • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
         • α) • rinvunitor fy)
       • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x))) = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((((((((# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1) ▹ fy)
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy)
     • (# F (id₁ x)
        ◃ (((lunitor fy • α ^-1) • rinvunitor fx)
           • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
         • α) • rinvunitor fy)
       • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
  • rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
 • (fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x))) =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) ▹ fy)
• ((## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
   • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • (lunitor fy
         • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1) ▹ fy)
• (rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy
   • ((# F (id₁ x)
       ◃ (lunitor fy
          • (α ^-1
             • (rinvunitor fx
                • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
      • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
         • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
              • (lunitor fx
                 • (α
                    • (rinvunitor fy
                       • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
             ▹ # G (id₁ x))
            • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x))
                 (# G (id₁ x))
               • ((fy
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
                  • (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x))))))))) =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) ▹ fy)
• ((## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
   • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
      • (lunitor fy
         • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (lunitor fy
       • (α ^-1
          • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx
              • (α
                 • (rinvunitor fy
                    • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • ((fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
               • (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))))))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker fy
   (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F (id₁ x))
      (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_id F x))))
^-1
• ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) ▹ fy)
   • ((## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
      • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
         • (lunitor fy
            • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (lunitor fy
       • (α ^-1
          • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx
              • (α
                 • (rinvunitor fy
                    • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (# G (id₁ x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • ((fy ◃ psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
               • (fy ◃ ## G (lunitor (id₁ x)))))))) =
((# F (id₁ x) ◃ psfunctor_id F x) ▹ fy)
• ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) ▹ fy)
   • ((## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
      • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
         • (lunitor fy
            • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))

fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
• (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (lunitor fy
       • (α ^-1
          • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx • (α • rinvunitor fy)))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))))) =
((# F (id₁ x) ◃ psfunctor_id F x) ▹ fy)
• ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) ▹ fy)
   • ((## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
      • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
         • (lunitor fy
            • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))))

   • ((## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ fy)
      • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy)
         • (lunitor fy
            • (rinvunitor fy • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))) =
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (lunitor fy
       • (α ^-1
          • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx • (α • rinvunitor fy)))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x)))))))

fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ id₁ (F x))
  • lunitor (id₁ (F x))) ▹ fy)
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
      • lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x)))) =
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (lunitor fy
       • (α ^-1
          • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx • (α • rinvunitor fy)))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x)))))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
 • (lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy))
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
      • lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x)))) =
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (lunitor fy
       • (α ^-1
          • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx • (α • rinvunitor fy)))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x)))))))

         • lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))))) =

x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (lunitor fy
       • (α ^-1
          • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)

   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
      • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
         • lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ (lunitor fy
       • (α ^-1
          • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
           • (lunitor fx • (α • rinvunitor fy)))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))))) = ?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
?b =
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
• ((lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
      • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
         • lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x)))))

   • (lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))

           • (lunitor fx • (α • rinvunitor fy)))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))))) = ?b

F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧

(# F (id₁ x)
 ◃ (lunitor fy
    • (α ^-1

• ((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx · # G (id₁ x))
      • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
     • (((lunitor fx • α) • rinvunitor fy)
        ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
    • rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
   • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x)))) = ?t2

  • (((lunitor fx • α) • rinvunitor fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))) = ?t2

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
((((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
     • rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy)
    • (id₁ (F x)
       ◃ (((lunitor fy • α ^-1) • rinvunitor fx)
          • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
  • (((lunitor fx • α) • rinvunitor fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))) =
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
• ((lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
      • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
         • lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
• (rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy
   • ((id₁ (F x)
       ◃ (lunitor fy
          • (α ^-1
             • (rinvunitor fx
                • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
         • (((lunitor fx • (α • rinvunitor fy))
             ▹ # G (id₁ x))
            • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x))
                 (# G (id₁ x))
               • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x)))))))) =
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
• ((lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
      • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
         • lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x)))))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x)) fy
• ((id₁ (F x)
    ◃ (lunitor fy
       • (α ^-1
          • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((lunitor fx • (α • rinvunitor fy))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))))) =
(lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
      • lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))))

   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((lunitor fx • (α • rinvunitor fy))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))))) = ?b

• (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(((((runitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
    • (id₁ (F x)
       ◃ ((α ^-1 • rinvunitor fx)
          • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
  • (((lunitor fx • α) • rinvunitor fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))) = ?b
