       ◃ ((α ^-1 • rinvunitor fx)
          • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G (id₁ x)))
  • (((lunitor fx • α) • rinvunitor fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
• ((id₁ (F x)
    ◃ (α ^-1
       • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((lunitor fx • (α • rinvunitor fy))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))))) = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
• ((id₁ (F x)
    ◃ (α ^-1
       • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) fx (# G (id₁ x))
      • (((lunitor fx • (α • rinvunitor fy))
          ▹ # G (id₁ x))
         • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
            • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))))) =
(lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ fy)
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ rinvunitor fy)
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
      • lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))))

((lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))
  • (rinvunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x)))
• (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))) =
lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))
• ((rinvunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x))
   • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
      • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))) =
lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))
• ((rinvunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x))
   • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
      • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))) = ?b
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
?b = lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))
• ((rinvunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x))
   • (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
      • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x))))) = ?b

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(rinvunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x))
• (rassociator fy (id₁ (G x)) (# G (id₁ x))
   • (fy ◃ lunitor (# G (id₁ x)))) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(rinvunitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x))
• (runitor fy ▹ # G (id₁ x)) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(rinvunitor fy • runitor fy) ▹ # G (id₁ x) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
id₂ fy ▹ # G (id₁ x) = ?t2

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
id₂ (fy · # G (id₁ x)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: C ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x)) • id₂ (fy · # G (id₁ x)) =
lunitor (fy · # G (id₁ x))

      apply id2_right.
    Qed.

 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence

x: B

α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(λ ααd : disp_left_adjoint_data
           (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
           inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj,
 disp_left_adjoint_axioms
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) ααd
 × disp_left_equivalence_axioms
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) ααd)

F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x

B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
fy -->[
left_adjoint_right_adjoint
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] fx
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(λ gg : fy -->[
        left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] fx,
 id_disp fx ==>[
 left_adjoint_unit
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj ;; gg
 × gg ;; inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj ==>[
   left_adjoint_counit
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] id_disp
                                                 fy)
  ?pr1

          
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
fy -->[
left_adjoint_right_adjoint
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] fx
 exact inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj.
          
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(λ gg : fy -->[
        left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] fx,
 id_disp fx ==>[
 left_adjoint_unit
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj ;; gg
 × gg ;; inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj ==>[
   left_adjoint_counit
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] id_disp
                                                 fy)
  inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
id_disp fx ==>[
left_adjoint_unit
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj ;; inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj ;; inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj ==>[
left_adjoint_counit
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] id_disp
                                               fy

            
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
id_disp fx ==>[
left_adjoint_unit
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj ;; inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj
 exact inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_unit.
            
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj ;; inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj ==>[
left_adjoint_counit
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)] id_disp
                                               fy
 exact inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_counit.
        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(λ ααd : disp_left_adjoint_data
           (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
           inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj,
 disp_left_adjoint_axioms
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) ααd
 × disp_left_equivalence_axioms
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) ααd)
  (inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj,,
   inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_unit,,
   inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_counit)
 abstract
            (refine ((_ ,, _) ,, (_ ,, _)) ;
             try apply C ;
             apply disp_inserter_locally_groupoidal).
    Defined.
  End Inv2CellToDispAdjEquiv.

x: B

α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(((linvunitor fx • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx))
  • inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_right_adj α)
 • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) • runitor fy = pr1 α

F, G: psfunctor B C
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: invertible_2cell fx fy
(((linvunitor fx • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx))
  • ((((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
       • α) • rinvunitor fy) • (fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))
 • (fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) • runitor fy = pr1 α

linvunitor fx
• ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fx)
   • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
      • (lunitor fx
         • (α
            • (rinvunitor fy
               • ((fy ◃ psfunctor_id G x)
                  • ((fy ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
                     • runitor fy))))))) = pr1 α

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
isPredicate
  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x))

• (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) = pr1 α

F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
x: B
fx, fy: disp_inserter_bicat x
α: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) fx fy
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fy) • lunitor fy)
  • ((((linvunitor fy • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy))
       • pr1 α) • (fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1))
     • runitor fx)) • rinvunitor fx)
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) = pr1 α

• (lunitor fy
   • (linvunitor fy
      • ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ fy)
         • (pr1 α
            • ((fx ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)
               • (runitor fx
                  • (rinvunitor fx
                     • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))))) =
pr1 α

               • (runitor fx

                     • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))))))) =
?b

HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
x: B

x0: fx -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] fx
isaprop
  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (internal_adjunction_data_identity x,,
      is_internal_adjunction_identity x,,
      is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (id₁ x),,
      is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (id₁ x)) x0)

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
x: B
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
x0: fx -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] fx
is_univalent_2_1 B
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
x: B
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
x0: fx -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] fx
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_inserter_bicat

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
x: B
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
x0: fx -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] fx
is_univalent_2_1 B
 exact HB.
        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
x: B
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
x0: fx -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x] fx
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_inserter_bicat
 exact disp_inserter_bicat_univalent_2_1.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
x: B
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
pr1
  (inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv
     (id2_invertible_2cell fx)) =
pr1 (disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence fx)
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
x: B
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
inv2_cell_to_disp_adjequiv_left_adj
  (id2_invertible_2cell fx) = id_disp fx

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
x: B
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • (id2_invertible_2cell fx) ^-1) • rinvunitor fx)
• (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) = id_disp fx

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
x: B
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
(((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
  • id₂ fx) • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x) =
((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx) • lunitor fx)
 • rinvunitor fx) • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
x: B
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (id₂ fx
      • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

        
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
x: B
fx: disp_inserter_bicat x
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ fx)
• (lunitor fx
   • (rinvunitor fx • (fx ◃ psfunctor_id G x)))

        reflexivity.
  Qed.
End DisplayedInserter.

(** Displayed inserters but with pseudo morphisms *)
Section PseudoMorphism.
  Context {B C : bicat}
          (F G : psfunctor B C).

  Definition is_pseudo_morphism
             {x y : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G)}
             (f : x --> y)
    : UU
    := is_invertible_2cell (pr2 f).

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G)
is_pseudo_morphism (id₁ x)

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G)
is_pseudo_morphism (id₁ x)

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G)
is_invertible_2cell
  (((((psfunctor_id F (pr1 x)) ^-1 ▹ pr2 x)
     • lunitor (pr2 x)) • rinvunitor (pr2 x))
   • (pr2 x ◃ psfunctor_id G (pr1 x)))

    is_iso ; apply psfunctor_id.
  Qed.

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G)
f: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hf: is_pseudo_morphism f
Hg: is_pseudo_morphism g
is_pseudo_morphism (f · g)

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G)
f: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hf: is_pseudo_morphism f
Hg: is_pseudo_morphism g
is_pseudo_morphism (f · g)

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y, z: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G)
f: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hf: is_pseudo_morphism f
Hg: is_pseudo_morphism g
is_invertible_2cell
  ((((((((psfunctor_comp F (pr1 f) (pr1 g)) ^-1
         ▹ pr2 z)
        • rassociator (# F (pr1 f)) (# F (pr1 g))
            (pr2 z)) • (# F (pr1 f) ◃ pr2 g))
      • lassociator (# F (pr1 f)) (pr2 y)
          (# G (pr1 g))) • (pr2 f ▹ # G (pr1 g)))
    • rassociator (pr2 x) (# G (pr1 f)) (# G (pr1 g)))
   • (pr2 x ◃ psfunctor_comp G (pr1 f) (pr1 g)))

    is_iso ; apply psfunctor_comp.
  Qed.

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_bicat (total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G))

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_bicat (total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G))

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ x y : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G),
total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ x : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G),
?P x x (id₁ x)
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (x y z : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G))
(f : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ y, z ⟧),
?P x y f → ?P y z g → ?P x z (f · g)

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ x y : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G),
total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
 exact @is_pseudo_morphism.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ x : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G),
is_pseudo_morphism (id₁ x)
 exact identity_pseudo_morphism.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (x y z : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G))
(f : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ y, z ⟧),
is_pseudo_morphism f
→ is_pseudo_morphism g → is_pseudo_morphism (f · g)
 exact @comp_pseudo_morphism.
  Defined.

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_inserter_bicat_pseudo

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_inserter_bicat_pseudo

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
∏ (x y : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G))
(f : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧),
isaprop (is_pseudo_morphism f)

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
x, y: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G)
f: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaprop (is_pseudo_morphism f)

    apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2_0 disp_inserter_bicat_pseudo

  
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2_0 disp_inserter_bicat_pseudo

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1
  (total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G))
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (x y : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G))
(f : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧),
isaprop (is_pseudo_morphism f)

    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1
  (total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G))
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2_1 (disp_inserter_bicat F G)

      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B
 exact HB.
      
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2_1 (disp_inserter_bicat F G)
 apply disp_inserter_bicat_univalent_2_1.
    
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (x y : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G))
(f : total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧),
isaprop (is_pseudo_morphism f)
 
B, C: bicat
F, G: psfunctor B C
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G)
f: total_bicat (disp_inserter_bicat F G) ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaprop (is_pseudo_morphism f)

      apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.
End PseudoMorphism.
